programmes.d: Janet and Philip have a wobble in the last stretch of their room renovation. Clive finds cracks in his handy work as a septic tank floods. Tim unexpectedly ends up in a hospital.
The team follow lions, leopards and cheetahs after a huge wildfire. The dominant male lions fight intruders, while the leopards and cheetahs struggle to get a meal.
The guides board a supersized cruise as they eat, drink, swim, sing and play their way across the Tasman to New Zealand. They stop at the majestic Milford Sound, charming Dunedin and more.
It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.
The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.
Five grown up children, with young families of their own, make the annual pilgrimage back to the family farm, inland from Wairoa, to help with the summer shear.
The team jump into super-popular Japan. From bustling Osaka to historical Kyoto, they get a taste for the country's food, culture, and kookiness, with Jono's new wife Danielle joining.
Season Finale: A summer market turns deadly when a local candy merchant dies in a freak accident. Vinny and Cole dig deeper and discover it was murder-and far more personal than they imagined. S1 E8.
Season Finale: Ralph jumps into action when violence escalates, then realises with horror that it is his turn to be hunted. S1 E4.
Months later, Lina enjoys a new relationship, but an innocuous encounter reveals the past isn't as buried as she hoped. S1 E4.
Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programmes.t: The Hillside Strangler: Devil In Disguise
programmes.d: A deep dive into the notorious Hillside Strangler murders that shocked Los Angeles in the late 70s, offering fresh insight into the minds of the infamous serial killing cousins who terrorised the city.
In this shocking expose, real-life cults are unravelled from the leaders down to the individual members, to help explain their extreme beliefs and what led them to committing homicide.

Dumb Bitch Sharon
On her birthday, Liz tries to repress her sadness over her late father. Over the course of the day, the group visits Liz, and they update her on their lives.

Te Ao Marama

The Blanket Mire
Season 7 finale: When the body of a missing 18-year-old is discovered buried on the moors, Vera digs deeper than the original enquiry, and into the dark secrets of the young woman.

Death and Dreams: In Midsomer Worthy, debt-ridden Martin Wroath is found shot to death, having apparently rigged up a way to trigger a shotgun with his toe.S6E2.

Death of a Timeshare Salesman: When former escort girl Alice Hill finds God and decides to confess her sins, the UCOS team find themselves reinvestigating the death of a well-known timeshare magnate.S6E5.
Episode 11: Jon Richardson and Roisin Conaty take on Joe Lycett and Danny Dyer in the classic words and numbers quiz.S16E11.

Côte d'Azur: When a rock band reunion ends in murder, Jack and Kate are thrust into a case; the case is riddled with secrets and a meticulously-planned alibi, before unveiling a killer hiding in plain sight.S2E7.

Dead Like You: When a series of chilling attacks in Brighton bear the same signs, Roy Grace has a feeling he's seen this before; he thinks that it could either be a copycat or an offender from his past. S3 E1.
Identity Part 1: Forensic crime drama series. When a people smuggler is found dead, Nikki delves into London's illegal immigrant community. S20 E1.
Identity Part 2: Forensic crime drama series. A horrific discovery pits Nikki and Jack against a killer preying on illegal immigrants. S20 E2.
Anatomy of a Memory: Professor T is persuaded by a former student - now a police detective - to help her investigate a serial rapist. S1 E1.
A Fish Called Walter: When a blameless librarian is poisoned at a drinks reception at the museum, Professor T is called upon to help narrow down the list of possible suspects. S1 E2.
Tiger Tiger: Professor T becomes embroiled in a hostage situation, but his unconventional negotiating tactics do not go down well with the police. S1 E3.
Mother Love: Professor T is called upon to help investigate the disappearance of a six-year-old girl. Tensions rise between DI Paul Rabbit and Prof T until they come to blows. S1 E4.

Episode 2: When the killers change the rules of their sick game, Rachel's safety is in question. As a police officer, Janet is powerless to protect her daughter but she knows she needs to stop the madness. S5 E2.

Episode 3: As the team makes a significant breakthrough in the case, Rachel's position as Acting DI is jeopardised. Janet's attempt to help Taisie results in a complaint, rocking her faith in justice. S5 E3.
Episode 5: The island's Day of the Dead celebrations are cut short by a woman's death. DI Mooney and the team must navigate the waters of the elitist Yacht Club to catch the killer. S7 E5.
Episode 6: The leader of a spiritual retreat is strangled and Jack and his team are baffled by the fact that all their suspects were in a meditation circle at the time of the murder. S7 E6.

Episode 2: Stewart persuades Ellie to help him uncover the mysterious circumstances lying behind Callum's death, but it seems the mystery is far from over. S1 E2.

Episode 4: As Syndicate 9 investigates the discovery of a woman's body in a Manchester hotel room, Gill introduces Rachel to high-flying DS Will Pemberton, unaware they are already well acquainted. S4 E4.

Episode 7: Long-buried memories are raked up for JP when someone from his past is caught red-handed at a murder scene and Jack must unravel a complex mystery to find the truth. S7 E7.
Episode 8: When the lead guitarist of a popular reggae band is murdered, Jack and his team must crack a cold case that has haunted the commissioner for years. S7 E8.
The Dutiful Child: When an attempt is made on a billionaire businessman's life, Professor T suspects the culprit may be much closer to home than the police suspect. S1 E6.
Episode 8: A wedding is hastily arranged following an unexpected turn of events. The arrival of the pill leads to unforeseen consequences. S6 E8.
Dry Bones That Dream: Part 2: Banks is tempted by an offer. Helen finds herself in danger as she closes in a killer. S2 E4.
Episode 2: A mystery unravels in the jungle when a game show contestant is stabbed on a zip line. Meanwhile, the team butt heads with Mervin... S14 E2.

The show where everything's made up and the points don't matter! Hosted by Drew Carey and featuring some of America's finest improvisational comedians.

The Three Million Dollar Piracy
A $3,000,000 royal wedding carriage disappears from its shipping container. Banacek attempts to make sense of it all.

The Vanishing Chalice
Banacek must figure out how an ancient Greek chalice could go missing from a closely guarded museum in Boston.

Double Jeopardy
When Robin Masters' latest book is made into a motion picture, the author donates the use of Robin's Nest as a location and Magnum is quickly enmeshed in the pettiness of the film world.

The Last Page
Victory doesn't mean the end of the war for some participants, including one Vietnam vet who wants to ensure Magnum never lives to see another glorious Hawaiian sunrise.

The Elmo Ziller Story
When Magnum encounters a guitar-playing, ten gallon hat wearer with a thick Texas drawl, who looks exactly like Higgins, he thinks he is being set up for a rip-roaring gag.

Three Minus Two
A beautiful fashion designer hires Magnum to protect her when one of her business partners is murdered.

Identity Crisis
Columbo finds himself in the secretive world of spies, when a CIA agent is killed. Although he is finding the investigation challenging, he's determined to find out the truth.

Encounter In A Closed Room
American and Soviet agents search for an Eastern European scientist intent on defecting to the United States.

The Young One
A rebellious teenager uses any means necessary to be free of her over-protective aunt. However, there is one loose end that she didn't accommodate for.

Tikka to Ride
The crew find returning from the dead is simple compared to the real dilemma confronting Lister. In the battle with their future selves, the curry supplies were destroyed!

Mission: McCall: Part 1
When McCall is kidnapped, Scott enlists help from one of his dad's former associates to free him. Guest starring Robert Mitchum. Pt 1 of 2.

A Million The Hard Way
In the middle of a busy casino, surrounded by guards, a million dollars goes missing from beneath a glass dome. Banacek is called to investigate. Guest starring Margot Kidder.

To Steal A King
A collection of valuable coins vanishes from a hotel room vault whilst the owners were sleeping mere meters away. Banacek must figure out how the impossible-to-open vault was so easily breached.

Ten Thousand Dollars A Page
A priceless book disappears from a sealed display case in a room that no thief could possibly escape. Banacek looks into how someone could beat the supposedly failproof alarm system.

The Greatest Collection Of Them All
Banacek investigates the theft of a multimillion-dollar collection of French paintings.

One Flu Over The Cuckoo's Nest
When the flu epidemic suddenly sweeps through Buchanan High, the enriched students are put with the Sweathogs when their teacher has taken ill, which creates a learning problem for Gabe's Sweathogs.

The Conflict
Grandpa's sister-in-law is being forced out of her home by the government. The Waltons help defend the homestead by any means. John-Boy is torn between his ideals and family loyalty.

Stoke Me a Clipper

The Hunters

Ponderosa Birdman

The Search
Adam learns his reputation is being ruined, by an ex-convict who looks identical to the eldest Cartwright son. Adam soon tracks down the ex-convict's girlfriend, but will she reveal his whereabouts?

Adam learns his reputation is being ruined, by an ex-convict who looks identical to the eldest Cartwright son. Adam soon tracks down the ex-convict's girlfriend, but will she reveal his whereabouts?

The Conflict
Grandpa's sister-in-law is being forced out of her home by the government. The Waltons help defend the homestead by any means. John-Boy is torn between his ideals and family loyalty.

The Hunters
After learning his wife has left him, a scientist-turned-traitor stands up his waiting spy contacts. This results in a race between the FBI and the Communists to find him.

Compo's Suit
If Nora won't have Compo, what are his chances with a thrice-widowed woman from Bradford?

The New Mobile Trio
The trio buy a car, but Clegg has to drive!

Father Vinnie
Barbarino's dying wish is that he should become a priest. Being a good Catholic boy, he decides to give up his evil ways and lead the life of priest.
The show where everything's made up and the points don't matter! Hosted by Drew Carey and featuring some of America's finest improvisational comedians.

The First Day
The whole family is excited about John-Boy's first day at Boatwright University. However, nothing seems to go right for him. Meanwhile, Jason tries to fill John-Boy's shoes at home.

Ouroboros
When two realities converge, the crew undergo their most terrifying ordeal yet - they bump into Lister's ex-girlfriend, Kristine Kochanski.

The Deadly
Plumber Jack Staley, who has been blackmailing housewives for fabricated dalliances throughout a suburban neighbourhood, sets his sights on a dangerous new target.

The Art of Photography
When Blamire takes up photography, no one can hide from his demon lens.

Forked Lightning
Clegg's bike attacks him where it hurts, so he decides it should be returned to where he bought it - 30 years ago.

Arrangement With Terror
Inspector Erskine goes undercover to link a criminal organisation to a fortune in stolen securities.

Now You See Him..
Columbo's latest murder scene is the magical stage of the Great Santini, a master magician. His employer was killed while the illusionist was on stage performing his act.

Martha Mason, Movie Star
A vain and egotistical woman can't get a divorce from her husband. Luckily, he loves to garden. And he has just dug a nice big hole in the backyard.

Mission: McCall: Part 2
Scott and Kostmayer must play by Dyson's rules if they want to retrieve McCall alive. Guest starring Robert Mitchum. Pt 2 of 2.

The Thoroughbred
John-Boy enters his mule in a local race in which Grandpa was the last Walton to win. However, there is more to play for than just family pride!

Duct Soup
Whilst crawling through the labyrinth of service ducts to restart their engines, the crew discover a few surprising things about one another.

Miss Paisley's Cat
An elderly woman's beloved cat is killed by the local bookie. The woman blacks out. When she awakens, she finds the nasty man has been murdered. Could she actually be responsible?

Who's That Dancing With Nora Batty Then?
With neighbour Gloria immigrating to Australia, a party with piano music is organised to give her a good send off - but where can they find a piano?

Changing Face of Rural Blamire
A trio of salesmen is Blamire's latest idea, but Shinyglow cleaner turns out not to be all it is meant to be.

The Set-Up
Erskine and Colby hunt for Larry Kulhane and his gang of bank robbers. At the same time, Kulhane plans to rob and kill a wealthy aristocrat. Guest starring Jessica Tandy.

Double Jeopardy
When Robin Masters' latest book is made into a motion picture, the author donates the use of Robin's Nest as a location and Magnum is quickly enmeshed in the pettiness of the film world.

The Last Page
Victory doesn't mean the end of the war for some participants, including one Vietnam vet who wants to ensure Magnum never lives to see another glorious Hawaiian sunrise.

Happy Anniversary
Knowing he must mark their anniversary with something special, Johnny takes Moira to the most exclusive restaurant in the area, where they run into a couple from their former life.

My Musical
A new patient turns Sacred Heart into a full-blown musical, as Carla wrestles with returning to work and Elliot faces the challenge of telling J.D. no.

His Story IV
Sacred Heart is divided by politics when an Iraq War veteran is admitted. J.D. scrambles to learn about the war, and Kelso rediscovers what it means to be a true leader.

My Road to Nowhere
J.D. embarks on an impromptu road trip to Tacoma for Kim's first ultrasound, commandeering Kelso's RV, while Dr. Cox frets over his baby's health.

My Perspective
J.D. keeps fainting from a rare condition, leaving Turk and Elliot scrambling to care for him. Carla leans on her \"I have a baby\" excuse, and the Janitor's vacation doesn't slow his mischief.

My Therapeutic Month
J.D. struggles to ask out a new PT, while Turk returns to his residency after breaking his arm and realises he's not as skilled as he thought.

My Night to Remember
On a slow day at Sacred Heart, a memory-loss patient sparks the staff to reminisce, with J.D., Elliot, Turk, Carla, Dr. Cox, Kelso, and the Janitor revisiting moments from the past six years.

My Fishbowl
Private Dancer faces a setback after being discharged, J.D. and Turk settle old scores, Dr. Cox questions a patient's recovery, and the Janitor's bizarre fish fiasco wreaks havoc.

Call Me Irresponsible
Frasier faces a personal and professional dilemma when he begins dating the ex-girlfriend of one of his radio show callers.

Beloved Infidel
After accidentally spotting their father getting cosy with an old family friend, Frasier and Niles grow suspicious that he may have been unfaithful during his marriage to their mother.

Selling Out
When Frasier is lured into doing on-air endorsements, he finds himself in a moral quandary as his professional credibility comes under fire.

Beckerethics
Becker faces one little problem when a patient asks for help to get benefits for his sick brother - he'll have to commit insurance fraud.

Smoke 'em If You Got 'em
Becker quits smoking on a day when nothing goes right, and there's $300 riding on whether he can make it through the day without a cigarette.

Dr. Angry Head
Becker lives out a Christmas Eve nightmare after he throws his back out and becomes stranded in a department store Santa's Village.

An Elephant Makes Love to a Pig
Genetic engineering is the hot topic at school, which gets Kyle thinking about the possibility of an elephant made smaller by design - an achievement that would surely win the science contest.

The Ungroundable
Convinced vampires exist at school, Butters gathers evidence. This sparks an identity crisis for the Goth kids, who are mistaken for vampires, and tempts Butters to go vampire.

Prehistoric Ice Man
Kyle and Stan’s friendship is tested after they find a frozen man and argue over whether to call him Steve or Gorak. At the lab, they learn that he's only been frozen for two years.

Pinewood Derby
To ensure Stan wins the Pinewood Derby trophy, Randy cheats. He steals a high-tech part and modifies Stan's ride. It can now reach warp speed, which grabs the attention of an alien gangster.

Ike's Wee Wee
Mr. Mackey's drug prevention lecture doesn't prevent him from losing a drug sample in class, so he's fired - while Kyle's plan to protect Ike backfires when his brother is mistaken for dead.

The Parade
The Carson City Parade Float Contest brings out the deputies' competitive spirit, resulting in the accidental re-creation of a national disaster.

Training Day
Jones adjusts to his new partner's unorthodox style, and Wiegel and Williams enjoy some surprisingly delicious racist wines.

Extradition to Thailand
While Junior and Jones reap the benefits that come from extraditing a murderer, Dangle and Rizzo receive a surprise crash course in surgery.

Digging with the Murderer
Dangle and Williams haggle with a serial killer to get him to reveal where he buried his victims.

Convinced vampires exist at school, Butters gathers evidence. This sparks an identity crisis for the Goth kids, who are mistaken for vampires, and tempts Butters to go vampire.

Prehistoric Ice Man
Kyle and Stan’s friendship is tested after they find a frozen man and argue over whether to call him Steve or Gorak. At the lab, they learn that he's only been frozen for two years.

Pinewood Derby
To ensure Stan wins the Pinewood Derby trophy, Randy cheats. He steals a high-tech part and modifies Stan's ride. It can now reach warp speed, which grabs the attention of an alien gangster.

Ike's Wee Wee
Mr. Mackey's drug prevention lecture doesn't prevent him from losing a drug sample in class, so he's fired - while Kyle's plan to protect Ike backfires when his brother is mistaken for dead.

Carl's Funeral
Johnny reluctantly agrees to speak at the funeral of a local man he doesn't really know, while Alexis struggles with her new boyfriend's love of animals.

Honeymoon
It's party time as Johnny and Moira attend Roland's Hawaiian bash, while Alexis and Ted host a couples' dinner night. Meanwhile, David and Stevie's relationship heats up.

My Point of No Return
As J.D. rethinks his future and Elliot questions marrying Keith, feelings begin to resurface. Dr. Cox meddles with godfather duties, and the Janitor rallies the \"Brain Trust\".

My Own Worst Enemy
After an unexpected moment with J.D., Elliot starts to second-guess the path she's on, while J.D. vows to stop getting in his own way for once.

Let Sleeping Drakes Lie
When Evan Drake hires Norm to paint his house while he's in Europe, Rebecca sees it as an opportunity to pop over and snoop around his bedroom. But he returns early, and Rebecca has to hide.

Airport V
Carla tries to overcome her fear of flying by attending Frasier's workshop, hoping to visit her husband, who has found a job in Seattle working as a penguin in an ice-skating show.

The Candidate
Frasier and Niles find themselves at odds with Martin when his support for a radical political candidate drives them to side with the main opponent.

Adventures in Paradise (1)
Frasier's dream vacation quickly turns into a nightmare when he discovers his ex-wife Lilith is staying at the same resort.

Picture Imperfect
Becker is elated when he's professionally recognised with an article in The New York Medical Journal, but deflated when he sees the unrecognisable photo of a stranger accompanying it.

Talking Points
When a patient loses his ability to speak, Becker gets him a portable talking computer - but what he has to say via the machine is probably better left unsaid.

Episode 1
Season 1 premiere: Leaving a lucrative radio career behind, Alan Partridge makes a daringly personal comeback on TV with Britain's first documentary on mental health.

Episode 2
Alan continues his crusade for the nation's sanity, asking the burning question: should we talk it out, or just shut up? And uses it to help the meek find their voice. S1 Ep2.

programmes.t: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
programmes.d:
Episode 43
Stephen Colbert brings his signature satire and comedy to late night, where he talks with guests about what's new and relevant in the world. Tonight's guests: Jimmy Fallon; Harvey Guillen.

Episode 31
Join host Michael Kosta and the Daily Show correspondents as they deliver a satirical sideswipe at the latest in news and current affairs. Tonight's guest: Mychal Threets.

Malcolm Meets Martin
Jordan and Keegan battle for applause as MLK and Malcolm X, a chopper traffic reporter hits unexpected turbulence and an R&B singer gets way too real with his partner, mid-love song.

It's a Jersey Thing
New Jersey is taking over the nation and spreading toward South Park, where the Jersey look is already taking hold. As the Jerseyites advance, the townsfolk turn to their enemies for help.

Tweek vs. Craig
After the boys argue over who is the biggest troublemaker in wood shop class, Tweek or Craig, they instigate a fight between them to settle the score.

Talking Points

Little Sister
When Moira's estranged sister pays an unexpected visit, Moira instinctively believes she's only in town to gloat, whereas Johnny sees it as a chance to improve their financial situation.

Surprise Party
Johnny tries to plan a surprise party for Moira, enlisting David's help, who pretends he's organising a fundraiser. Things backfire when Moira takes over, unwittingly planning her own party.

My Hard Labor
As Kim goes into labour, J.D. questions their future together. Turk races to beat a video game before Carla catches him, while Dr. Cox hunts for a doctor worthy of his baby's shot.

My Inconvenient Truth
After watching 'An Inconvenient Truth', the Janitor launches a crusade to make Sacred Heart eco-friendly, and J.D.'s brother Dan returns, forcing J.D. to face some uncomfortable truths.

The Sam in the Gray Flannel Suit
When Sam is chosen over Rebecca to work as an executive in the corporate offices, she's not happy at all - until the truth comes out: the company's softball team needs an injection of talent.

Our Hourly Bread
When Sam and Woody get knocked back for raises by Rebecca, they come up with an alternative approach: a raffle night at Cheers to pack the bar, but Woody drops the ball.

Adventures in Paradise (2)
Jealousy rears its ugly head when Frasier bumps into Lilith and her new boyfriend while vacationing with his new girlfriend.

Burying a Grudge
Martin finds it hard to \"forgive and forget\" when he runs into a former police buddy who's in the hospital.

Too Much, Too Late
A mortified Jake must deal with a persistent Reggie, who wants him to achieve a goal he set in the sixth grade, while Margaret drives the office crazy after saving a patient's life.

Piece Talks
Reggie's great deal on a new freezer, via Bob's sketchy friend, comes with a not-so-great catch. Becker acts as a sex therapist for an 80-year-old couple who are out of step in the bedroom.

New Car
Wanting a car, Johnny sets himself a budget of $4,000 - consisting largely of David's money. But at the dealership, Johnny and Moira quickly stray from their plan to buy something practical.

Driving Test
Worried about the future of the motel and their own prospects, Johnny and Moira try to think of creative business solutions. Meanwhile, David panics at the thought of retaking his driving test.

programmes.t: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programmes.d:
Episode 4
One of the funniest and most refreshing personalities to hit the TV scene, John Oliver returns with another episode of his Emmy award-winning talk show.

Das Negroes
Jordan and Keegan hide in plain sight from an SS officer, two overlooked slaves grow insulted on the auction block, and a gangster's perfect hit unravels due to a disastrous bathroom mishap.

The Branding
Jordan and Keegan tackle frat life, a mythical Pegasus sparks chaos in a neighbourhood, a rapper takes a bullet where it hurts most, and Obama lets loose with his anger translator once again.

Insheeption
When it's discovered that both Stan and Mr Mackey are holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, treatment for Stan's hoarding disorder traps him in Mr Mackey's subconscious.

Sexual Harassment Panda
After Peetie the Sexual Harassment Panda's class talk, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment before pursuing another legal action to secure a larger settlement.

Johnny finds a potential buyer for the town, while David and Alexis discover they may have become more attached to Schitt's Creek than they ever thought possible.

Ain't No Reason to Get Excited
Daryl and Katy set out to revive Wayne's love life, but a night of bar antics, Grindr confusion, and an unexpected encounter reignites his inner fighter.

My Identity Crisis
Carla worries her daughter will lose her Latin roots, J.D. must ace the Janitor's quiz or mop his way through the day, and Dr. Cox confronts life without his family.

My Growing Pains
J.D. has decided to grow up, but Turk tries to tempt him back into mischief, Dr. Cox delivers some tough news, and at long last, Dr. Kelso's true age is revealed.

Slumber Party Massacre
Carla sinks into a deep depression when she finds out she's going to be a grandmother, so the gang plans a slumber party to get her out of her funk and rekindle memories of her youth.

Bar Wars
On the anniversary of the day Cheers finally beat Gary's Old Towne Tavern at something, the two bars reignite their long-standing rivalry with a series of pranks.

Seat of Power
Determined to prove Martin wrong, Frasier and Niles tackle a simple household repair, but when disaster strikes, they call in back up, only to be confronted with their high school tormentors.

Roz in the Doghouse
Frasier's tactless remark about Bulldog's motives backfires when Roz accepts the producer position, leaving Frasier stuck with a string of incompetent fill-ins.

Parannoyed
Convinced that one of his neighbours is messing with his laundry, mail, and apartment, a fired-up Becker wants revenge.

Missteaks
After Becker receives a package of expensive steaks from a patient, he's forced to host a barbecue for the whole gang.

Switch Hitter
Gob jumps ship and joins a rival firm. As tensions rise, Michael takes charge of organising the annual softball showdown between the two companies.

Queen for a Day
Michael cashes in his share of the company stock to buy something special, unaware that his family has done the same. Lucille 2 returns and discovers that Buster has struck up a new romance.

Facing worsening weather conditions, one charter boat faces a hard decision about whether to head home as their clients become increasingly seasick.

Grammy-nominated rock star and former Guns N' Roses guitarist, DJ Ashba, shows up at ATM and asks Brett and Wayde to build him a creepy skull-themed aquarium. S5 E10.
A hungry predator encroaches, forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam Bam must play nice with his siblings to break ground on his homestead. S5 E5.
Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue and people are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. S5 E13.

A catastrophic collapse of the Northwestern's crane leaves Sig and Mandy with no way to haul pots. On the Cornelia Marie, a deckhand narrowly escapes disaster.

Deep in the Peruvian jungle, a supersized beast is terrifying locals. Jess hunts for evidence that a legendary creature known as Yacumama is on the prowl.

All New Expedition Unknown
In a holiday search spanning three continents, Josh chases the true history of St. Nicholas, the real-life saint who has become known as Santa Claus.
An unknown apex predator is preying on orcas off the frozen coast of Kodiak, Alaska. Can the team identify the monster before it strikes again?
Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue and people are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. S5 E13.

Comedian Bill Engvall requests a Zen-like fish tank for his new office in Hollywood. But a firm weight restriction throws a wrench in his plans. S5b E11.
When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to work out how to incubate it. Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch. S5 E6.
The AIMS team investigates the mysterious barn where they heard the roar of the Cherokee Death Cat.
Bus-dwelling Virginia homesteaders struggle in the wilderness. The Raneys urgently help a couple who sent their son away until the homestead can thrive.
The extended Kilcher family struggle through a record-breaking harsh winter. Desperate for food, Atz Lee and Jane venture into the brutal elements in search of food. S2 E1.

Cardinal Lawrence is tasked with running one of the worlds most secretive and ancient events - selecting the new Pope. Lawrence finds himself at the centre of a conspiracy that could shake the very foundation of the Catholic Church.
After a glamorous yet tumultuous life in the public eye, famed opera singer Maria Callas retreats to Paris, where she reckons with her identity.
A small town is terrorised by a serial killer, and everyone is a suspect - including the authorities. As the bodies mount up, the mystery deepens.
A kung fu prodigy trains with two legendary teachers - Mr Han and the Karate Kid himself, Daniel LaRusso - to face a formidable rival in an epic martial arts showdown.
With governments and enemies on their trail, Ethan Hunt and the IMF team search for the Entity - a rogue AI that could destroy mankind.
Fresh out of prison, Adam moves back to his old neighbourhood seeking redemption. But the volatile brother of the man Adam killed wants revenge.
Based on the remarkable true story, an English teacher helps transform a wild schoolboy into one of the biggest stars Wales has ever produced: Richard Burton.

Cardinal Lawrence is tasked with running one of the worlds most secretive and ancient events - selecting the new Pope. Lawrence finds himself at the centre of a conspiracy that could shake the very foundation of the Catholic Church.
After a glamorous yet tumultuous life in the public eye, famed opera singer Maria Callas retreats to Paris, where she reckons with her identity.
A small town is terrorised by a serial killer, and everyone is a suspect - including the authorities. As the bodies mount up, the mystery deepens.
A kung fu prodigy trains with two legendary teachers - Mr Han and the Karate Kid himself, Daniel LaRusso - to face a formidable rival in an epic martial arts showdown.
A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.
A Roman Epic set in an imagined Modern America. In the city of New Rome, an artist seeks a utopian future, but is opposed by the greedy mayor. The mayor's daughter finds herself caught between them.

After 20 years away, Odysseus returns home from the Trojan War, haggard and unrecognizable. But much has changed in his kingdom - his wife is held prisoner by suitors vying to be king, and his son faces death at their hands.

A young sex worker from Brooklyn gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and impulsively marries the son of a Russian oligarch. Winner of the Palme d'Or at Cannes and winner of five Oscars, including Best Picture.
A couple's picture perfect life is thrown into turmoil when a stranger arrives claiming their daughter was switched at birth - and that he's her father.
When Iris and Isaac's first romantic weekend away doesn't go as expected, Iris resorts to extraordinary lengths to prove she and Isaac are meant to be together.
A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

After 20 years away, Odysseus returns home from the Trojan War, haggard and unrecognizable. But much has changed in his kingdom - his wife is held prisoner by suitors vying to be king, and his son faces death at their hands.
A couple's picture perfect life is thrown into turmoil when a stranger arrives claiming their daughter was switched at birth - and that he's her father.
After a horrific crime, a grieving man roams the land as a creature of the night. Befriended by a kind immigrant family, the instinctive killer soon faces a choice of revenge or redemption.
Eddie and Venom are on the run. With the net closing in, they're forced to make a choice that could mark the end of their symbiotic partnership.
A group of environmental activists set out to vandalise a home superstore. Their protest quickly turns into a massacre when they find themselves trapped with a hunting-obsessed security guard.
In 1940s Australia, a ragtag team of divers are hired to salvage a sunken car from a murky river. However, a vicious bull shark has other ideas.

In 1954 New Zealand, Nellie, Daisy, and Lou are sent to a remote island institution for delinquent girls. Taking refuge in their growing friendship, the trio rally against the system. It’s hard to reform girls who don’t believe they need reforming.
In a fading Midwestern town, the local legend of Frendo the clown becomes all too real as teens start to go missing one by one - and meet spectacularly sticky ends.
With governments and enemies on their trail, Ethan Hunt and the IMF team search for the Entity - a rogue AI that could destroy mankind.
Every year the “Heart Eyes Killer” wreaks havoc on Valentine’s Day by stalking and murdering romantic couples. This Valentine's Day, no couple is safe.
After fleeing from a job gone wrong in the UK, a down-on-his-luck hitman must babysit the nerdy teenage son of a crime boss and show him how to become a man.

An intimate look at Nigerian-born, New Zealand-based MMA champion Israel Adesanya. Going beyond the ring and exploring his experiences of masculinity, bullying and the power of dance, this is a poignant examination of the electrifying fighter known as 'The Last Stylebender.'.
After a scandal, Hollywood starlet Lauren Lane retreats to a remote cabin. Betrayed by the man she trusted the most, Lauren becomes trapped in a brutal fight for survival.

With governments and enemies on their trail, Ethan Hunt and the IMF team search for the Entity - a rogue AI that could destroy mankind.

After fleeing from a job gone wrong in the UK, a down-on-his-luck hitman must babysit the nerdy teenage son of a crime boss and show him how to become a man.

An intimate look at Nigerian-born, New Zealand-based MMA champion Israel Adesanya. Going beyond the ring and exploring his experiences of masculinity, bullying and the power of dance, this is a poignant examination of the electrifying fighter known as 'The Last Stylebender.'.
After a scandal, Hollywood starlet Lauren Lane retreats to a remote cabin. Betrayed by the man she trusted the most, Lauren becomes trapped in a brutal fight for survival.
After the shocking murder of her daughter, a woman turns her high-tech smart home into a trap for the killer, initiating a deadly cat-and-mouse game where every move can be fatal.
Holed up in a Las Vegas hotel room, a former champion boxer embarks on an intensive and illegal weight-cut programme with an unscrupulous trainer.
Raised by his devoted mother, a brilliant young man risks everything he's worked for to free his imprisoned father. Based on a true story.
A small town is terrorised by a serial killer, and everyone is a suspect - including the authorities. As the bodies mount up, the mystery deepens.
In 18th century France, a young widow flouts convention by assuming the reins of the family wine business. Based on the true story of the “Grande Dame of Champagne.\".
A detective teams up with a professor of African Studies to track down a serial killer who's practising an ancient form of black magic.

American photographer and fashion model Elizabeth 'Lee' Miller defies expectations to become a correspondent on the front lines of WWII, capturing some of the most important and shocking images of the war and the Nazi regime.

It’s been 28 years since the rage virus emerged. One group of survivors live on a heavily defended island off the coast of England. When they venture to the mainland they discover that the infection - and humanity - have both evolved.
Holed up in a Las Vegas hotel room, a former champion boxer embarks on an intensive and illegal weight-cut programme with an unscrupulous trainer.
A small town is terrorised by a serial killer, and everyone is a suspect - including the authorities. As the bodies mount up, the mystery deepens.
In 18th century France, a young widow flouts convention by assuming the reins of the family wine business. Based on the true story of the “Grande Dame of Champagne.\".
A detective teams up with a professor of African Studies to track down a serial killer who's practising an ancient form of black magic.
Casual flings turn serious for three bachelor buddies whose once-simple love lives start getting complicated.
High school bandmates Bill and Ted embark on a most epic journey through time, to pass history class and save mankind!
One is irresistible, the other a hypochondriac. They are the 'The Sleepover Bandits', the most charismatic and inventive thieves in the country.
When a lucky Manhattan socialite kisses the most unlucky man on Earth at a masquerade ball, their respective fortunes take a surprising turn.

Soft-spoken Laura's life is crumbling around her. With her future looking bleak, Laura discovers a terrifying yet oddly charming monster in her closet who encourages her to follow her dreams - and fall in love with her inner rage.
High schooler Bianca's world is shattered when she learns she's known as a DUFF (Designated Ugly Fat Friend). Enlisting the help of football jock Wesley, she sets about reinventing herself.

programmes.t: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programmes.d: Incompetent cop Frank Drebin uncovers a plot to assassinate the Queen of England.

programmes.t: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programmes.d: Lieutenant Frank Drebin discovers his ex-girlfriend's new man is involved in a plot to kidnap a clean energy lobbyist.
A man seizes the chance to reunite with his dream girl from high school, even though their brief relationship had been a total disaster.
In 1975, a troupe of young comedians and writers changed TV forever. This is what happened in the 90 minutes before the first Saturday Night Live.
Young Amelie works in a Paris cafe, lives alone – and helps people, surreptitiously. Contains English Subtitles.
A tough Texas Ranger must go undercover on campus to protect a squad of cheerleaders when they inadvertently witness a gangster's murder.
A pair of underachieving cops are sent back to a local high school to blend in and bring down a drug ring.
After making their way through high school (twice), big changes are in store for officers Schmidt and Jenko when they go deep undercover at a local college.
While pursuing art school, a young man learns how the art world really works, and finds he must adapt his vision to the reality that confronts him.
Jane - a woman who's happily served as a bridesmaid 27 times - faces a turning point when her sister announces she's engaged to the man Jane is secretly in love with.
Four socially awkward teen misfits head off on summer holiday to Malia - where it's no parents, no teachers, no money, and little chance with the ladies.
Neil, Simon, and Will join Jay on his gap year in Australia, bringing a bunch of awkward British hilarity with them.
Believing she's destined to die alone, Ally Darling begins a wild search for the best ex of her life.
Bollywood meets Hollywood in this cross-cultural update of Jane Austen's classic, in which a wealthy American meets an Indian beauty.
When a star coach is murdered and his priceless Pink diamond stolen, France is in an uproar. Fortunately, Inspector Jacques Clouseau is on the case.

programmes.t: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programmes.d: Frank Drebin comes out of retirement to help the squad infiltrate a gang of terrorists planning to detonate a bomb at the Academy Awards.
Professional golfer Whitney returns home to Budapest to reevaluate her future. While there, Daniel helps her rediscover herself.
Chasing after her rebellious teen daughter, a single mum goes on a road trip with her former lover across picturesque Italy.

Don and Ellie are long-divorced, but they must play a happy couple for the sake of their adopted son's wedding, when his ultra-conservative biological mother unexpectedly decides to attend the nuptials.

programmes.t: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates
programmes.d: After placing an ad for respectable dates to a wedding, two party animal brothers find themselves with women more out of control than themselves.
The Hoover family put the fun into dysfunctional as they pile into a VW bus and head to California to support 7-year-old Olive in her bid to win the Little Miss Sunshine Contest.

Desperate to pay the bills, three elderly friends decide to buck retirement and step off the straight-and-narrow for the first time in their lives by attempting to knock off the bank that absconded with their money.
Carl Allen is a guy whose life is going nowhere - until he signs up for a self help program based on one simple requirement: say yes to everything... and anything.
After refusing to compromise his creative integrity, a head chef quits his job at a prominent Los Angeles restaurant and launches his own food truck.
Jack mistakes Nancy, a 34-year-old single woman, for his 24-year-old blind date. But could she be his perfect match?
An art curator seeks revenge on his abusive boss by conning him into buying a fake Monet, but his plan requires the help of an eccentric and unpredictable Texas rodeo queen.

Best friends Dreux and Alyssa discover that Alyssa's boyfriend has blown their rent money. The duo find themselves in a madcap race against the clock to avoid eviction and keep their friendship intact.

Aspiring writer Rebecca Bloomwood has a small, totally under control shopping habit. Ironically, Rebecca lands a job as a columnist for a financial magazine and, much to her surprise, becomes an overnight success.
Rob, a record store owner and compulsive list maker, recounts his top five breakups, including the one in progress.
Peggy Sue, a middle-aged wife and mother on the verge of a divorce, passes out at her high school reunion and wakes up to find herself back in 1960 - with a chance to re-live her life.
A geeky journalist enrols in high school to write about what's cool and ends up re-living the greatest embarrassments of her teen years.
Tom believes in a cosmically destined, once-in-a-lifetime love. Summer doesn't. But that doesn't stop Tom from going after her.
In the world of covert intelligence, CONTROL agents Maxwell Smart and Agent 99 embark on a mission to thwart the latest plan for world domination from rival spy agency KAOS.

programmes.t: Love on the Danube: Love Song
programmes.d: Fellow cruise ship passengers Sarah and Jack try to engineer a romance between their widowed, musically inclined parents.
Nadine is desperate to move past the awkward loneliness of high school after her all-star big brother begins dating her best friend.

Raised by their eccentric aunts, sisters Gillian and Sally Owens just happen to be fourth-generation witches. As they struggle to use their gifts and overcome the family curse, falling in love is the trickiest spell of all.
In Durham, North Carolina, the Bulls minor league baseball team has a rare asset - a poetry-loving groupie who has an affair with one player per season.
When a woman realises her brother is about to marry the girl who bullied her in high school, she sets out to expose the fiancee's true colours.

programmes.t: The Adventures of Priscilla, Queen of the Desert
programmes.d: Two drag queens and a transsexual travel aboard a pink bus named Priscilla to a cabaret gig in the middle of the desert.
When three of the popular girls discover they've all been tricked into dating the same guy, they enlist a shy newcomer to help exact revenge on their triple-timing boyfriend.

It's 1993, and high-school valedictorian Brandy Klark decides she needs to shed her uptight image before college. She puts together a list of all the activities - including sex - she missed in high school.
A survivalist family are confronted with the real world after the death of their mother and find their way of life challenged.
Gorgeous cheerleader Jennifer takes evil to a whole new level after she’s possessed by a bloodthirsty demon. Can her best friend put an end to the horror?

programmes.t: The Diary of a Teenage Girl
programmes.d: In 1970s San Francisco, a sharp-witted 15-year-old chronicles her emerging sexuality, and begins an affair with her mother’s boyfriend.
When two popular TV hosts land an interview with a surprise fan - North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un - they are recruited to assassinate him.

Three best friends decide to give up their tradition of wild holiday partying - but not before one final drug-fuelled Christmas Eve in New York, and a quest to find the Holy Grail of Christmas parties.

A pretty, popular teenager can't go out on a date until her ill-tempered older sister does. Teenage love, lies, and consequences take centre stage in this modern-day high school remake of Shakespeare's The Taming of the Shrew.
Twin brothers reunite in Hong Kong to avenge their parents' murder by a vicious Triad gang.
An ex-Navy Seal who was demoted for insubordination is the only person who can stop a group of terrorists who've hijacked a U.S. battleship.
Terrorists use a train as a mobile HQ to gain control of a destructive U.S. satellite. Only one man can stop them, former Navy Seal Casey Ryback.
In a dystopic and crime ridden city, a fatally wounded cop returns to the force as a powerful cyborg haunted by his memories.
During the final days of the Great War, a group of U.S. soldiers are sent behind enemy lines to rescue a lost platoon.
Homeless and on the run from a military court martial, a damaged ex-special forces soldier seizes an opportunity to assume another man’s identity - transforming into a vigilante in the process.
This sequel pits Robocop against a gang of drug dealers and a supposedly improved version of himself that has gone berserk.
A former U.S. Ranger is trapped when America's most dangerous criminals commandeer their prison transport plane.
An American submarine crew is tasked with infiltrating a German vessel to retrieve a top-secret Nazi Enigma machine.
When their plane crashes in the Alaskan wilderness, John Ottway must lead his team of oil-rig roughnecks through the icy elements as a pack of hungry wolves haunts their every step.
Robocop takes on ruthless developers and their mercenary army who are trying to evict tenants from their homes.
When a small outpost is ambushed, a US Army squad must take the battle underground on a high-stakes mission during the Vietnam War.
Montana, 1876. Ruthless headhunter Hollis Ransom tracks his own brother through Big Sky country with the help of a young fur trapper.
An ordinary house-cleaner discovers that she is intergalactic nobility. Soon, she must embrace her destiny and travel from the streets of Chicago to far flung galaxies in order to save humanity.
After surviving an assault from a squad of hit men, retired CIA agent Frank Moses reassembles his old team for an all-out war.

Four years after being gunned down at her own wedding, a former assassin wakes from a coma and vows to seek vengeance on those who betrayed her. Devising a hit list, she sets off on her quest, facing unspeakable injury and unscrupulous enemies.
A retired CIA agent reunites his unlikely team of elite operatives for a global quest to track down a missing portable nuclear device.
Hiding out on Earth, teen alien John Smith is hunted by the Mogadorians, an evil extraterrestrial race who plan to wipe out him, and all his kind.
A former FBI agent becomes judge, jury, and executioner after a corrupt Florida businessman wipes out his entire family at a reunion.

The Punisher turns the streets of New York City red as he wages a one-man war on organised crime. He must face his most deadly foe yet - Jigsaw, a mob boss he left horribly disfigured and who is set on revenge.
Locked up in Myanmar's toughest prison for a crime they didn't commit, siblings Charlie and Jack compete in televised fights to win their freedom.
Soulmates Eric and Shelly are murdered. To save the love of his life, Eric must traverse the worlds of the living and the dead, seeking revenge. A modern reboot of the iconic film.
By keeping its speed above 50 mph, a rookie cop must prevent a bomb planted aboard a city bus from detonating.
After fighting in the Civil War, two Union Army buddies find themselves on opposite sides of the law, putting the post-war peace at risk.
An immortal Scottish swordsman must confront the last of his immortal opponents, a brutal barbarian who lusts for the fabled \"Prize\".
A descendant of the mysterious secret society known as the Assassins, travels back to 15th-century Spain through a revolutionary technology that unlocks the genetic memories contained in his DNA.
A freelancing former U.S. Intelligence agent tries to track down a mysterious package that is wanted by the Irish and the Russians.
A security expert agrees to take on one last job - breaking out of most high tech, ultra-secret prison on the planet.
The Bride continues on her quest of vengeance against the band of assassins who had tried to kill her, taking them down one by one until there’s nothing left to do... but kill Bill.
Former outlaw Nathaniel Reed now leads a quiet, honest existence. However, an unhinged U.S. Marshal will stop at nothing to exact his vengeance.
The right hand man to a New York crime lord is seduced and blackmailed by a woman seeking retribution.
A covert military task force tracks a mysterious energy disturbance at a secret base in New Mexico. Once there, the team encounters an unknown being of extraordinary strength and speed.
A retired master car thief, Randall 'Memphis' Raines, must steal 50 exotic cars in 48 hours to save his brother's life.
In this reimagining of the 1974 thriller, Dr Paul Kersey embarks on a trail of vengeance after his family are viciously attacked in their home.
A Navy Seal commander is sent into the heart of war-torn Africa on a hazardous mission. However, the doctor they were sent to rescue will only join them if they agree to save 70 refugees too.

Nick Wild is a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal professional skills and a personal gambling problem. When a friend is assaulted by a sadistic thug, he helps her take revenge but finds himself pitted against the mob.
When an ex-Federale is hired to perform a covert hit and then double-crossed, he launches a brutal rampage of revenge.
Marshal John Breaker and Deputy Bugle Bearclaw make a stand to protect the residents of a small town from the most savage gang in the West.
An American tourist visiting Italy is seduced by a beautiful woman and becomes ensnared in a plot involving Interpol and the Russian mafia.
After being betrayed and left for dead in Italy, a thief and his crew travel to L.A. with a plan to steal back their fortune and bring down their double-crossing former ally.
A Russian gunslinger aids a marshal and a sheriff in a standoff against a bloodthirsty outlaw gang known as The Hellhounds.
An American submarine captain discovers a secret plot for a Russian coup. He must assemble an elite group of Navy SEALs to rescue the kidnapped Russian president and prevent World War III.
Machete is recruited by the U.S. President for a seemingly impossible mission - to save Washington from a maniacal arms dealer and his bloodthirsty team.

A hitman learns he's been injected with a deadly poison that will kill him if his heart rate drops. He must keep his adrenaline up and stay two steps ahead of his nemesis while he searches for an antidote.
An ex-enforcer for a local crime syndicate vows to enact retribution on his mob bosses after serving 19 years of wrongful imprisonment.
An ageing hitman is forced to train a young prodigy with an attitude, when his employer moves to replace the old guard.
When hit-man Chev Chelios discovers his nearly indestructible heart has been replaced with a battery-operated ticker, he embarks on a frantic chase through Los Angeles to find the thief who stole it.
Despite only having one arm, Nick Newell strives to become an MMA champion and prove that people with disabilities are just as capable of greatness.

Although attorney Matt Murdock is blind, his other four senses function with superhuman sharpness. By day he represents the downtrodden. At night he is Daredevil, a masked vigilante stalking the dark streets - a relentless avenger of justice.
In the near future, robot boxing is a top sport. A struggling promoter teams up with his estranged son to build and train a championship contender.
Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. Cade forms an unlikely alliance with Bumblebee, an English lord, and an Oxford professor to save the planet.

The outrageous true story of Jordan Belfort, a young stockbroker hungry for a life of non-stop thrills, where corruption was king and more was never enough. His rise to power earned him the title The Wolf of Wall Street.
Six Californians start a club to discuss the works of Jane Austen. Their relationships soon start to resemble 21st-century versions of her novels.
After a disastrous car accident, Paige suffers from severe memory loss. Her husband tries everything to win her heart back.
A small Texan town becomes the centre of a chain reaction of violence when a local hunter stumbles upon some dead bodies, a stash of heroin, and $2 million in cash near the Rio Grande.
Secret Service agent Mike Banning is framed for the attempted assassination of U.S. President Allan Trumbull. Now, Banning must evade the FBI and his own agency to uncover the real threat.
A washed-up former star mounts an ambitious Broadway production in hope of breathing new life into his stagnant career.
A country legend with a drinking problem goes on a comeback tour with a rising star. However, old demons threaten the tour's success.
When a motorcycle stunt rider starts robbing banks to provide for his family, it puts him on a dangerous collision course with an ambitious police officer.
Based on legendary athlete Jim Braddock, a once promising boxer, who makes a comeback carrying the dreams of the disenfranchised on his shoulders.

Mike is an entrepreneur by day, but by night he's a star exotic dancer at an all-male strip club. When Mike takes a young newcomer under his wing, he finds himself falling for the new kid's sister - and questioning his life choices.
A veterinary school student meets the star performer of a circus. They bond through their compassion for a special elephant.
During the rise of the women's movement, a famous 1973 tennis match stirs up a televised rivalry between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs.
In their youth, the Tenenbaums, an eccentric New York family, were extraordinary. As adults, they're still extraordinary - extraordinarily flawed.

An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker reject the capitalist life and form an underground bare-knuckle fight club. The first rule of Fight Club is: you do not talk about Fight Club.
After her mother's death, midwestern teen Sara gives up ballet and moves to Chicago's South Side, where she meets a hip hop dancer with all the right moves.
When his brother mysteriously vanishes - and the police show little interest - Russell takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

Olympic wrestling champions Mark and Dave Schultz join a team funded by eccentric multi-millionaire John Du Pont. But Du Pont's destructive behaviour threatens to consume them all. Based on the chilling true-crime story.
Minnesota car salesman Jerry Lundegaard's inept crime falls apart due to his own bungling, his incompetent henchman, and the persistent police work of a pregnant police chief.
On her birthday, Ruby discovers a series of new and frightening abilities, forcing her parents to send her away to a government camp.
A young man enlists to serve in World War I when his beloved horse is sold to the cavalry, He hopes he and his horse will be reunited.
A feisty policewoman and a quadriplegic ex-homicide detective go inside the mind of a diabolical killer in order to beat him at his own game.
During the height of the Great War, two young British soldiers embark on a dangerous mission through enemy territory.
Forget what you think you know about the formidable Muhammad Ali, this is the real story - from 1964 to 1974, from religion to politics and into the ring.
When the president's daughter is trapped in an outer-space prison housing earth's deadliest criminals, the only man who can get her out is a former government agent convicted of treason.
When reckless teen Langdon is sentenced to community service, he finds his life changing as he falls for quiet Jaime Sullivan, the local minister's daughter.
Two young lovers find one another on the maiden voyage of the \"unsinkable\" R.M.S. Titanic. When the luxury liner collides with an iceberg, their love affair becomes a desperate race for survival.

A woman finds what appears to be a snuff film amongst her late husband's belongings. When she hires private investigator Tom Welles to determine if it's real, his search sends him into society's darkest corners.
The unforgettable journey of two teenagers whose love unfolds when they meet at a cancer patients' support group.
The tale of a high school senior whose 'live-in-the-now' philosophy is challenged upon meeting a not-so-typical 'nice girl'.
In a dystopian world, single adults are forced to couple up within 45 days or face being transformed into animals and released into the woods.
A hacker is hired by a rogue spy agency to help steal $9.5 billion from super-encrypted government funds.
A struggling street musician in Dublin meets a young Czech immigrant who is also an aspiring singer-songwriter. They decide to collaborate, creating songs that reveal their unique story.
The story of Solomon Northup, the New York State citizen who was kidnapped and made to work on a plantation in 1800s New Orleans.
In Gotham City, Arthur Fleck - a failing party clown and aspiring comedian - begins a slow descent into madness, eventually transforming into the criminal known as Joker.
In the sweltering heat of August in Oklahoma, a family crisis brings the strong-willed women of the Weston family back to the house they grew up in, and to the dysfunctional woman who raised them.
Two illegal immigrants uncover the darker side of London when they find a human heart in a toilet at the seedy hotel where they work.
A lone man fights his way across America in order to protect a sacred book that holds the secrets to saving humankind.
Shakespeare's timeless story of star-crossed lovers is given a glitzy, modern update while staying true to the original dialogue.
A caretaker forms a special bond with her patient, a man struggling to cope with his recent disability.
A rookie cop spends his first day as an LA narcotics officer with a rogue detective whose methods blur the line between justice and corruption.

In a future world divided by factions based on virtues, teenager Tris learns she's Divergent and won't fit in.  Warned that she must conceal her status, Tris uncovers a looming war which threatens everyone she loves.
Tris and Four face one seemingly insurmountable challenge after another, as they unravel a conspiracy that threatens the future of their world.
At the time of the Mexican Revolution, an explosives expert teams up with a greedy bandit to rob a national bank, but accidentally becomes a revolutionary hero against his will.
An ambitious young lawyer gets a man acquitted of murder. After the trial, he learns the man is guilty and has resumed his killing spree.
The lives of three small-town steel mill workers are changed forever after fighting in the Vietnam War, the experience leaving them with terrible physical and psychological wounds.
A blind date between a workaholic yuppie and a beautiful blonde starts off well. But, the beauty turns beastly after a few too many wines.
A classic fairy tale, with swordfights, giants, an evil prince, a beautiful princess, a few pirates, and yes, some kissing (as read by a kindly grandfather).
A smooth-talking musician and a determined lounge singer embark on a rocky romance as their careers begin a long uphill climb.

They were perfect strangers, assembled to pull off the perfect crime. Then their simple robbery explodes into a bloody ambush, and the ruthless killers realise one of them is a police informer. But which one?
A young FBI agent must receive the help of an incarcerated psychopathic murderer in order to catch another ruthless serial killer.
A very special family, an extraordinary time, and a child's adventure while a world is at war.
An African-American man moves to a wealthy white suburb, where buffoonish local cops mistake him for a burglar, then get a petty criminal to take him hostage to avoid a scandal.
A famed lawman and gunslinger of the Old West is haunted by his past and his reputation.
The biographical story of singer Ritchie Valens, whose promising life was cut short by a plane crash.
The cult rock opera about a couple who take refuge at a mad scientist's house, only to become pawns in his experiments.
Amidst the battlegrounds of WWII, a squadron of British RAF bombers attempts to cripple the Nazis by taking out their dams.

In a dystopian 1997, Manhattan has been turned into a brutal maximum security prison. When the U.S. President's plane is hijacked and crashes onto the island, it’s up to hard-bitten ex-soldier Snake Plissken to rescue him.
The true story of the life of boxer Jake LaMotta, whose violence and temper led him to the top in the ring, but destroyed his life outside of it.
An Irish bomber escapes from prison and targets a member of the Boston bomb squad.
Ned Merrill decides to swim through a string of backyard pools. At each house, Ned is somehow confronted by a reminder of his past failures.

programmes.t: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programmes.d: Two buddies - one blind, the other deaf - go on the run to solve a murder and clear their names.

With a facial difference due to a rare disease, John Merrick is abused and ostracised, living his life as the 'Elephant Man' in a circus sideshow. However, Dr Treves sees the person beyond the deformities.

Benjamin has just graduated college and is deciding what to do with his life. An unexpected diversion crops up when he is seduced by an older woman, Mrs. Robinson, and then starts to fall in love her daughter.
Miserable in his marriage, Sheriff Henry Tawes falls in love with teenage seductress Alma, who is the daughter of a local criminal.
A lawyer falls for the chief suspect in the murder of a San Francisco heiress.
The story of Sir Thomas More, who stood up to King Henry VIII when the King rejected the Roman Catholic Church to obtain a divorce and remarry.

programmes.t: And Now for Something Completely Different
programmes.d: Wild and wacky humour from the first and second seasons of Monty Python's Flying Circus.
After suffering a brutal defeat and being told he can no longer fight, boxer Louis 'Mountain' Rivera struggles to find a new direction in life.
The story of rockabilly pioneer Jerry Lee Lewis is explored from his early stardom to his controversial marriage to his 13-year-old cousin.
After attempting suicide, a US war hero ends up in a mental hospital. He learns how poorly the patients are treated and sets out to change the system.
The story of the friendship between Al and Birdy - from their childhoods to their scarred and traumatised lives as Vietnam veterans.
Meet the Devil. She's lusty, drop-dead gorgeous, and she's giving Elliott seven wishes. However, he's going to get more than he bargained for.
A lawyer, disgusted with legal corruption, is forced to defend a judge he despises in a rape trial. If he doesn't do it, the judge will have him disbarred.
Darkness seeks to create eternal night by destroying the last of the unicorns. Jack and his friends do all they can to prevent that from happening.
After getting out of prison, a charming sociopath goes on a crime spree in Miami. Along the way, he joins up with a trusting hooker.
The vibrant and beautiful Fanny Brice starts out as a bit player on the vaudeville stage and works her way up to stardom on Broadway.
An assistant district attorney must protect a mob witness as she travels through the Rocky Mountains to appear at the trial.
On his way up the corporate ladder, David Basner confronts his greatest challenge - his father.
A career criminal considers getting out of the business after one last score, while an obsessive cop desperately tries to put him behind bars.

Two young, attractive serial killers become tabloid-TV darlings. As a sensationalistic press reports on the pair, they go on a blood-drenched, murderous road trip. A controversial, satirical look at violence, murder, and the American media.
With an Oscar-nominated score by Duke Ellington, this is a must-see for jazz fans about two musicians vying for success in Paris.
In the summer of 1963, 17-year-old Frances \"Baby\" Houseman vacations with her parents at a resort, where she meets Johnny the hotel dance instructor, who is as experienced at life as Baby is naive.
A young boy, who is haunted by dead people that only he can see, seeks the help of a child psychologist.
After their plane crash lands on a desert island, a group of schoolboys find themselves deprived of adult supervision.
The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a purposely bad team so they'll lose and she can move them to Florida. But when the plot is uncovered, they start winning just to spite her.
A hilarious family saga about three generations of criminals who unite for one big caper.

Benjamin has just graduated college and is deciding what to do with his life. An unexpected diversion crops up when he is seduced by an older woman, Mrs. Robinson, and then starts to fall in love her daughter.

programmes.t: The Man Who Would Be King
programmes.d: Two British soldiers in India resign from the Army and set themselves up as rulers in Kafiristan.
A chance meeting with a beguiling woman shatters the dreams of a young baseballer. Sixteen years later, he is given another shot at the big leagues.
Two days ago, a mermaid showed up at the Statue of Liberty. For Alan, it was love at first sight, but there's something fishy going on between these two.
Left behind when his plover family migrates, Ploey must overcome his fear of flying and dodge villainous vultures and other perils to find his own way south.
Mistaken for a famous archaeologist, construction worker Tad is sent on a mission to save a lost city.
The life of a lovable dog is turned upside down when his family go on holiday without him and he finds himself captive in a canine prison.
Soon after settling in with his new family, a formerly stray dog learns their landlord is planning something terrible.
A beautiful mermaid washes ashore and into the lives of two best friends. She enlists their help to capture the heart of a hunky lifeguard.
When Prince Ivan is kidnapped, it's up to Bartok to rescue the young Romanoff - even if it means confronting the evil witch Baba Yaga.
Spark is a wisecracking teenage monkey who lives on an abandoned planet with his friends Chunk and Vix. When an evil warlord plans to destroy the entire universe, no one but Spark can stop him.
Time for bed! We'll see you first thing in the morning.
A small but brave donkey and his animal friends become unsung heroes in the great story of the first Christmas.

programmes.t: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs
programmes.d: An inventor tries to solve world hunger only to see things go awry as food starts falling from the sky.
It's Dolittle vs Darwin when the animals launch a labour strike to protect their forest from human developers.
In his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. Chaos ensues when Harold grows up and draws himself into the real world. Based on the beloved children's classic.
When a domesticated grizzly bear and a one-horned mule deer become stranded in the woods during hunting season, it's up to the duo to turn the tables on the hunters.

programmes.t: Dr. Seuss' Horton Hears A Who!
programmes.d: Horton the elephant struggles to protect a microscopic community from his neighbours who refuse to believe it exists.

To save their family farm, 11-year-old Annie and her best friend - a remarkable dog called Runt - aspire to compete at the prestigious Krumpets Dog Show in London. Based on the beloved book by Craig Silvey.
Reluctant to dance, the son of Mumble the tap-dancing penguin runs away from home and meets a penguin that can fly.
Lucas discovers that he's a monster! To make matters worse, he finds out in front of the most popular kids in school!

programmes.t: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion
programmes.d: Asterix and Obelix help Getafix search for a young druid worthy of succeeding him, all while an old nemesis seeks to steal the recipe for his legendary magic potion.
Garfield embarks on a mission to find Odie, despite locking him out of the house in the first place.
Elfie's world is upended when she discovers the existence of a technically advanced Elfkin clan, which is in stark contrast to her own.
Time for bed! We'll see you first thing in the morning.

An American family moves into a stately English mansion, where they quickly discover the house is haunted. The 300-year-old ghost of Sir Simon De Canterville has met his match when he tries to spook the new arrivals!

programmes.t: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children
programmes.d: When Jake follows the clues left by his dead grandfather, he discovers a place with unique characters in possession of strange powers.

A brave young panda travels from China to Africa to rescue his best friend, Jielong the Dragon, who has been kidnapped. Along the way, he discovers an amazing new world of mountains, deserts and jungles.
An easily scared young boy, a professional ghosthunter, and a slimy ghost team up to save their town from the next ice age.
Bailey finds a new destiny: Protect Ethan's granddaughter. His multiple lives are filled with love, devotion, and a few good belly rubs.

programmes.t: Captain Sabertooth and the Magic Diamond
programmes.d: Captain Sabertooth sets sail to find the legendary Magic Diamond, which is said to grant wishes when held in the moonlight.

programmes.t: Captain Sabertooth and the Countess of Grel
programmes.d: The Countess of Grel ambushes Captain Sabertooth's ship, stealing a sacred figurehead and kidnapping a young crewmate.

programmes.t: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Voyage of the Dawn Treader
programmes.d: Lucy and Edmund return to Narnia where they meet up with Prince Caspian for a trip aboard the enchanting Dawn Treader.
Cursed with a spell that steals the heart of every maiden in the Kingdom, Prince Charming embarks on an unusual quest for true love.
A young boy is whisked away to a magical kingdom where an evil wizard has cast a spell of gloom over the land.
Step into the imagination of a man who set out to reveal that life itself can be the most thrilling show of all.
Time for bed! We'll see you first thing in the morning.
The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron. Better known as sworn enemies, they were once friends who bonded like brothers, and changed the fate of Cybertron forever.
The leader of the dark forest bans the notion of love. However, when he meets a feisty fairy princess, his mind begins to change.
The delightful story of a shy penguin's quest to find a special stone to woo his sweetheart.
On the cusp of her 13th birthday, Betty just wants to fit in with her magical, musical family. But there's a lot that she doesn't yet know.

programmes.t: Maya the Bee: The Honey Games
programmes.d: After accidentally humiliating the Empress of Buzztropolis, Maya unites with a team of bugs to compete in the Honey Games.
Two garden gnomes, Gnomeo and Juliet, try to avoid tragedy and find a happy ending to their star-crossed love affair.

programmes.t: Rabbit School: Guardians of the Golden Egg
programmes.d: A city rabbit gets trapped in an old-fashioned school. The school uses archaic methods to protect the Golden Egg from a family of cunning foxes.

programmes.t: Legend of the Guardians: The Owls of Ga'Hoole
programmes.d: A young owl searches for the Guardians of Ga'Hoole - the only hope of saving the owl kingdom.

programmes.t: Justin and the Knights of Valour
programmes.d: In a kingdom where lawyers rule and knights have been ousted, a young boy must overcome steep opposition to achieve his dream.

Teenage Ronnie isn't pleased when her mother ships her to a Southern beach town to spend the summer with her estranged father. While her dad uses a shared love of music to try and reconnect, Ronnie finds romance with a handsome local.
Emmet, an ordinary LEGO figurine finds himself on an epic quest to stop an evil tyrant from gluing the universe together, a journey for which he is hopelessly and hilariously underprepared.
An adventurous young girl uses her imagination to escape her reality, but it's rapidly spinning out of control.
Time for bed! We'll see you first thing in the morning.
A Calabrian teenage girl learns some difficult truths about her close-knit family after her father suddenly abandons them. 2021. Italy. Director: Jonas Carpignano. Starring: Swamy Rotolo.

programmes.t: Untold: The Disappearance Of Shannon Matthews

programmes.t: Where the Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programmes.d: Chile: Ben Fogle travels to the forests of Chile to meet northern Brit Scott and his young family, and visit their hand-built off-grid cabin in the woods. S11 E3.

programmes.d: Scientists lock a man in a nuclear bunker to uncover how our body clock affects our health. S1 E1.
