Friends
Kiri and Lou sing a song celebrating their wonderful friends of all shapes, sizes, and personalities.

Abuela's Quinceanera/ Story Time
Dora throws her Abuela a super-secret quinceanera with a special dress, tiara, and shoes! Dora's friend Coco doesn't have a story for Story Time, so they go to the Tall Tale Tree in search of one.

The Big Cheese
Rat talks the Bananas into searching for the long-lost 'Big Cheese' and doing lots of jobs for him while they do so.

The Floating Bananas
When the Bananas accidentally swallow one of Charlie's inventions, they suddenly find themselves up in the air.

Blue's Storytime with Camila
Camila, the librarian, wants to share a special story in American Sign Language, so let's play Blue's Clues to uncover which tale it is while learning brand new signs along the way!

Dino Rescue Pups Save a Pterodactyl/ Dino Rescue Pups and the Big Rumble
While Rex is out collecting lemons and mint leaves for a sneezy Stegosaurus, a Pterodactyl mom and her egg get into trouble. An erupting volcano puts all the dinosaurs in danger at Dino Wilds.

Dino Rescue Pups Save a Hum Dino
While searching Dino Wilds for a dinosaur to teach his kittens how to roar, Mayor Humdinger takes a wild ride on a runaway Brachiosaurus heading for Adventure Bay, where it could cause major damage.

Bea's Day Off/ Top Wing Big Swirl Games
The Cadets try to give Bea a day off, but when Swift's jet goes haywire, they need her to race to the rescue. Competing in the Big Swirl Games, Brody tries to land his cool turbo-surfing move on land.

The Graveyard Shift / Krusty Love
While working the graveyard shift, Squidward spooks SpongeBob with a chilling tale. / Mr. Krabs falls head over claws for Mrs. Puff when she stops by the Krusty Krab.

The Blind Bandit
Aang's search for an earthbending teacher leads to a fierce underground tournament and a mysterious blind girl with unmatched skill. As visions align and secrets unravel, destiny takes form.

Home of the Fave / Hero Today, Gone Tomorrow
Dad worries Lola thinks he plays favourites, so he tries to treat all his kids equally. / When Lynn's friend Margo scores a one-in-a-million goal, Lynn struggles with her jealousy.

The Fourfold Trap
Trapped in a gauntlet of deadly challenges set by a brainwashed Karai, the Turtles must rely on their skills while Splinter races against time to save them.

Family Reunion / Grandpa's Date
At a family reunion, Tommy worries Angelica will trade him, but her lie may backfire on her. / When Grandpa Lou's long-lost love pays him a visit after 40 years, he tries to hide that he's a grandpa.

Home Is Where the Dirt Is / New Leash on Life
CatDog go on a mission to find pesky Gopher, who has ruined Cat's vegetable garden. / Cat's plan backfires when he tells Dog that there is a new law that requires all dogs to be leashed.

All Bottled Up / Zoom Zahramay
Shimmer and Shine fall for Zeta's bottle trap, now its up to Leah and the pets to figure out how to save them. / It's the Zahramay Falls Magic Carpet Race!

programmes.t: Play School: Nursery Rhyme News Time
programmes.d:
Twinkle Twinkle Little Star
Breaking news! \"StarTube\" sensation \"Twinkle Twinkle\" longs to be the biggest star in the universe! Newsreader Kaeng gets to the bottom of the rhyme with Emma as \"Twinkle Twinkle\"!

programmes.t: Play School: Nursery Rhyme News Time
programmes.d:
Pat-A-Cake
Breaking news! Contestants bake as fast as they can at the Grand Final of 'Big Ted's Bake-Off' for an unexpected result! Newsreader Emma gets to the bottom of the rhyme with Teo as the Bake-Off Host.

programmes.t: Play School: Nursery Rhyme News Time
programmes.d:
Old King Cole
Breaking news! His royal majesty the King has called for his pipe, his bowl and his fiddlers three! Newsreader Abi gets to the bottom of the rhyme with Teo as the King's Royal Aide.

Having Fun At The Beach
Groove and move to DJ Dorothy's techno version of 'Fruit Salad'! Then, head to the beach with Caterina, Anthony, and John as Frankie and her mum help John find his missing item!

Simon's Bird Calls
Tsehay hears a pretty tune, and it's from Simon, practicing his bird calls! Join them as they make animal noises to try and call a bird over and come along with Buddy on a beautiful nature walk.

Wildlife Strife
Davey tries to snap a butterfly photo, but  rambunctious  chipmunks keep interrupting. A surprising choice leads to a picture-perfect solution.

Procrastination / I'm with Stupid
SpongeBob battles every distraction imaginable while trying to write an essay. / Patrick scrambles to prove he's not a dummy when his parents visit for Starfish Day.

No Bones About It / Beach Blanket Babies
When Grandpa Lou takes the Rugrats to the Natural History Museum they spend the day looking for a treat for Spike. / Chuckie has one goal on his beach adventure: to set the 'Sea Moneys' free.

Neferkitty / Curiosity Almost Killed The Cat
Cat reads a story to Dog about how Egyptians worshiped Cats. / Winslow catches Cat reading Dog's diary and blackmails him.

The Blind Bandit
Aang's search for an earthbending teacher leads to a fierce underground tournament and a mysterious blind girl with unmatched skill. As visions align and secrets unravel, destiny takes form.

Home of the Fave / Hero Today, Gone Tomorrow
Dad worries Lola thinks he plays favourites, so he tries to treat all his kids equally. / When Lynn's friend Margo scores a one-in-a-million goal, Lynn struggles with her jealousy.

The Fourfold Trap
Trapped in a gauntlet of deadly challenges set by a brainwashed Karai, the Turtles must rely on their skills while Splinter races against time to save them.

The Graveyard Shift / Krusty Love
While working the graveyard shift, Squidward spooks SpongeBob with a chilling tale. / Mr. Krabs falls head over claws for Mrs. Puff when she stops by the Krusty Krab.

Race to Sky High Mountain
At the starting line for Race to Sky High Mountain, one of Crusher's cheats threatens to sideline Blaze for good. To get back in this race, Blaze will need... Power Tires!

Penny's Deep Sea Dive/ Rod's Big Jump
Penny gets trapped rescuing her friend Salty's old boat, and he must alert the team. Rod tries to earn all three of his jump badges in one day, with the final jump requiring an actual rescue.

The Towering Tower of Crepes!
Jasper must master the spatula to help Butterbean cook for Chef Belle Legume and create the Towering Tower of Crepes!

Eight Wiggles Dancing
Join in the wiggly fun and explore The Wiggles' favourite activities, including jumping, running, and skipping. Wave to Bok the Dancing Puppet, while counting along with 'Eight Wiggles Dancing'!

John's Fruit Salad
John seeks help from Fruity and Fresca, the strength specialists, as he faces a challenge of losing strength due to missing breakfast. Explore the letter 'R' then sing-along to the 'Banananana' song!

Friends
Kiri and Lou sing a song celebrating their wonderful friends of all shapes, sizes, and personalities.

Abuela's Quinceanera/ Story Time
Dora throws her Abuela a super-secret quinceanera with a special dress, tiara, and shoes! Dora's friend Coco doesn't have a story for Story Time, so they go to the Tall Tale Tree in search of one.

The Chase
Exhausted from being relentlessly pursued, Team Avatar begins to fracture under pressure. As tensions flare and bonds are tested, a fierce battle erupts.

The Unnatural / Dopes on Slopes / Dog Ate It
CatDog plays baseball on rival teams, but Cat resorts to disguises when his skills fall short. / CatDog skis into mayhem. / Cat urges Dog to slim down before their big dance contest.

Spaced Out / Nine Lives
Cat sets out to ruin the Mean Bob movie, but winds up on screen instead. / A slip in the attic sets Cat's eight spirits free, and now the chase is on!

Intern for the Worse / The Old and the Restless
Lincoln and Clyde compete for manager at Flip's Food & Fuel, sparking a rivalry over a special cup. / Lincoln decides to take Pop-Pop out on an adventure, but must return him by 6:00pm.

Buried Secrets
The team uncovers a Kraang ship hidden beneath April's house, where they find her long-lost mother. But as April begins to reconnect, the Turtles grow suspicious.

The Croaking
After storming out, Mikey finds solace in the woods with a mutant frog. But when he discovers that the frog's family plans to attack the human world, Mikey must stop them before it's too late.

All Bottled Up / Zoom Zahramay
Shimmer and Shine fall for Zeta's bottle trap, now its up to Leah and the pets to figure out how to save them. / It's the Zahramay Falls Magic Carpet Race!

Breaking news! Contestants bake as fast as they can at the Grand Final of 'Big Ted's Bake-Off' for an unexpected result! Newsreader Emma gets to the bottom of the rhyme with Teo as the Bake-Off Host.

programmes.t: Play School: Nursery Rhyme News Time
programmes.d:
Old King Cole
Breaking news! His royal majesty the King has called for his pipe, his bowl and his fiddlers three! Newsreader Abi gets to the bottom of the rhyme with Teo as the King's Royal Aide.

Dino Rescue Pups Save a Pterodactyl/ Dino Rescue Pups and the Big Rumble
While Rex is out collecting lemons and mint leaves for a sneezy Stegosaurus, a Pterodactyl mom and her egg get into trouble. An erupting volcano puts all the dinosaurs in danger at Dino Wilds.

Dino Rescue Pups Save a Hum Dino
While searching Dino Wilds for a dinosaur to teach his kittens how to roar, Mayor Humdinger takes a wild ride on a runaway Brachiosaurus heading for Adventure Bay, where it could cause major damage.

Having Fun At The Beach
Groove and move to DJ Dorothy's techno version of 'Fruit Salad'! Then, head to the beach with Caterina, Anthony, and John as Frankie and her mum help John find his missing item!

Simon's Bird Calls
Tsehay hears a pretty tune, and it's from Simon, practicing his bird calls! Join them as they make animal noises to try and call a bird over and come along with Buddy on a beautiful nature walk.

Wildlife Strife
Davey tries to snap a butterfly photo, but  rambunctious  chipmunks keep interrupting. A surprising choice leads to a picture-perfect solution.

Procrastination / I'm with Stupid
SpongeBob battles every distraction imaginable while trying to write an essay. / Patrick scrambles to prove he's not a dummy when his parents visit for Starfish Day.

Home of the Fave / Hero Today, Gone Tomorrow
Dad worries Lola thinks he plays favourites, so he tries to treat all his kids equally. / When Lynn's friend Margo scores a one-in-a-million goal, Lynn struggles with her jealousy.

The Blind Bandit
Aang's search for an earthbending teacher leads to a fierce underground tournament and a mysterious blind girl with unmatched skill. As visions align and secrets unravel, destiny takes form.

The Fourfold Trap
Trapped in a gauntlet of deadly challenges set by a brainwashed Karai, the Turtles must rely on their skills while Splinter races against time to save them.

The Inventing Bananas
The Bananas decide they'd love to be inventors just like their friend Charlie.

Promises
Rat finds it's very easy to make promises but not quite so easy keeping them.

Tickety's Big Musical Morning
Tickety kicks off the morning with a brand-new wake-up song while Josh gets ready, Felicia sorts her busy schedule, and everyone works to discover what special time is just around the corner.

Dino Rescue Pups Save a Sore Dino/ Dino Rescue Pups Save the Triceratops Tag Alongs
A baby Stegosaurus gets stuck in a hole after a T-Rex chomps on trees to fix its sore mouth. A dinosaur chase begins when Francois feeds a curious Triceratops seafood chips, attracting a Pterodactyl.

Pups Save the Big Bad Bird Crew/ Pups Save a Soapbox Derby
Traveling Travis is back in town with a mischievous, troublemaking companion, Myrna the Mynah bird. Mayor Humdinger disguises himself to enter a rocket-powered racer in the \"kids only\" soapbox derby.

Top Wing Rescues Survivor Bear/ Timmy Wings It
The Cadets team up to rescue TV adventure star Survivor Bear, who comes to Big Swirl to brave Icy Summit. When Swift hurts his wing, Timmy Turtle has to help pilot the Flash-Wing to save the day.

Sailor Mouth / Artist Unknown
SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally learn a \"bad word\" and shock the town until Mr. Krabs sets them straight. / Squidward teaches art, but only SpongeBob shows, and it turns out he's a natural.

Zuko Alone
In exile and alone, Zuko finds fleeting friendship in a quiet Earth Kingdom town. But as memories of family and betrayal resurface, a single act reveals his true identity.

The Write Stuff / Racing Hearts
When Lucy quits the writing club over Principal Huggins' strict rules, Mum takes over. / Luna and Sam team up for the Royal Woods scavenger hunt, but their clashing styles make things tricky.

Dinosaur Seen in Sewers!
When Raph befriends Zog, a battle-hardened Triceraton warrior, he soon realises this alliance may cost him more than he bargained for.

No Bones About It / Beach Blanket Babies
When Grandpa Lou takes the Rugrats to the Natural History Museum they spend the day looking for a treat for Spike. / Chuckie has one goal on his beach adventure: to set the 'Sea Moneys' free.

Neferkitty / Curiosity Almost Killed The Cat
Cat reads a story to Dog about how Egyptians worshiped Cats. / Winslow catches Cat reading Dog's diary and blackmails him.

A Tree-mendous Rescue / Flying Flour
Shimmer, Shine and their friends set out a mission to find a brand new gem deep within Genie Forest. / When the girls bake magical flying cookies, Zeta and Nazboo try to steal the flying flour.

Episode 11
Come along on a fun-filled, delicious adventure with The Wiggles! Dance along to classics like \"Hot Potato\" and \"Fruit Salad\" and sing along with a new favourite, \"Marshmallow\".

Episode 12
Spread joy and happiness with Caterina, Bubbles the Mermaid, and The Wiggles in this episode all about friendship!

Yael Stone: All The Ways To Be Smart
Be inspired with Yael Stone and Play School's Jemima on the Story Time couch, as Yael reads the joyous and beautifully illustrated 'All The Ways To be Smart', by Davina Bell and Allison Colpoys.

Tom Forrest: The Heartbeat of the Land
Famous for his outback cooking videos with Grandad, Tom Forrest joins friends Kiya and Joey to read 'The Heartbeat of the Land' by Cathy Freeman, with Coral Vass, illustrated by Tannya Harricks.

Butterfly
When Carrie the Caterpillar becomes a beautiful butterfly, Moe is jealous that he doesn't have wings.

Jellyfish Hunter / The Fry Cook Games
Mr. Krabs cashes in on \"Jelly Patties\", but the craze spirals out of control when jellyfish are nearly wiped out. / SpongeBob and Patrick go from best pals to bitter rivals in the Fry Cook Games.

Reptar on Ice / Family Feud
The Rugrats bring a 'Baby Reptar' to the ice show, but the real Reptar's scared of lizards. / When game night sparks a neighbourhood war, Tommy and Chuckie hatch a plan to set things right.

Smarter Than the Average Dog / Catdog Doesn't Live Here Anymore
Cat makes Dog watch educational videos but isn't so happy when Dog ends up smarter than him. / Fed up with everyone, CatDog take off, and the others realise just how much they miss them.

The Playzone
The Bananas cause trouble when one of their games gets out of control.

The Shell
When Rat and Topsy find a pretty shell on the beach, they both want to keep it.

Something New at Blue's School
Join Josh and Blue at school for a day of trying new things! Josh is excited to try being teacher for the day, but Blue seems nervous to try something new.

Pups Save the Skydivers/ Pups Save the Cupcakes
While skydiving, Mayor Goodway and a nervous Farmer Al jump early and land on a ledge above a lion. After tracking their missing blueberries, Alex and the Mini Patrol get locked inside the Flounder.

Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Pupmobiles
Sid Swashbuckle and Arrby swipe the Key to the City, meant for the PAW Patrol, and set off to find as much loot as they can, assisted by their pirate crabs who have stolen the pups' vehicles.

Junior Cadets Rescue/ Sunken Treasure Race
Top Wing are training friends when they're needed for a rescue, giving their friends a chance to help. The Cadets, McBats, and pirate crocs race to be the first to find sunken treasure.

Squid on Strike / Sandy, Spongebob and the Worm
Squidward convinces SpongeBob to join him on strike after Mr. Krabs skips their pay. / An Alaskan Bull Worm rampages through Bikini Bottom, and Sandy sets out to stop it.

The Chase
Exhausted from being relentlessly pursued, Team Avatar begins to fracture under pressure. As tensions flare and bonds are tested, a fierce battle erupts.

Stage Plight / Antiqued Off
Luan joins the school play to get closer to her crush and she nervously faces her first-ever kiss. / Clyde and Zach bond over antiques at the Flea Market, leaving Lincoln as a third wheel.

Annihilation Earth!: Part 1
With Earth on the brink of destruction, the Turtles and their allies storm the Technodrome and battle deadly weapons in a fight to save Earth.

Reptar on Ice / Family Feud
The Rugrats bring a 'Baby Reptar' to the ice show, but the real Reptar's scared of lizards. / When game night sparks a neighbourhood war, Tommy and Chuckie hatch a plan to set things right.

Smarter Than the Average Dog / Catdog Doesn't Live Here Anymore
Cat makes Dog watch educational videos but isn't so happy when Dog ends up smarter than him. / Fed up with everyone, CatDog take off, and the others realise just how much they miss them.

Mermaid Mayhem / Snow Place We'd Rather Be
The girls meet a mermaid and explore her underwater world. / Princess Samira sends Leah and the genies on a search for a snowflake gem hidden inside an ice palace.

Episode 13
It's a Halloween Party! Join The Wiggles as they prepare for the big party by singing, dancing, and making toffee apples.

Episode 14
Explore musical dynamics with The Wiggles! Join Evie as she teaches Captain Feathersword about the importance of volume and tone.

Crazy
Lou does what he thinks is the craziest thing ever, but Kiri isn't so sure.

Empathy
Lou explains to Marzipan what hugs are for.

Listen
Dalvanius' giant ears help him hear the music of nature.

Breakfast
Kiri and Lou have a wild adventure delivering a giant fruit to Pania.

Meteors
While Lou warns everyone that meteorites are falling, Small does her exercises.

The lgae's Always Greener / Spongeguard on Duty
Plankton invents a machine to swap lives with Mr. Krabs, but discovers that being Mr. Krabs isn't as great as he imagined. / SpongeBob signs up as a lifeguard, but there's one problem: he can't swim!

Superhero Chuckie / The Dog Broomer
Inspired by an old superhero show, Chuckie becomes a crime-fighter, and he's already got his first mission! / The Rugrats try to protect Spike from the \"dog broomer\".

Send in the Catdog / Fetch / Fishing for Trouble
CatDog join clown school, Dog shines but Cat struggles to keep up. / Cat wins a radio prize, but Dog's antics make claiming it tricky. / Cat has his eye on Dog's pet fish, and it looks delicious.

While Lou warns everyone that meteorites are falling, Small does her exercises.

The lgae's Always Greener / Spongeguard on Duty
Plankton invents a machine to swap lives with Mr. Krabs, but discovers that being Mr. Krabs isn't as great as he imagined. / SpongeBob signs up as a lifeguard, but there's one problem: he can't swim!

Stage Plight / Antiqued Off
Luan joins the school play to get closer to her crush and she nervously faces her first-ever kiss. / Clyde and Zach bond over antiques at the Flea Market, leaving Lincoln as a third wheel.

The Chase
Exhausted from being relentlessly pursued, Team Avatar begins to fracture under pressure. As tensions flare and bonds are tested, a fierce battle erupts.

Annihilation Earth!: Part 1
With Earth on the brink of destruction, the Turtles and their allies storm the Technodrome and battle deadly weapons in a fight to save Earth.

Super Job Morgan
Morgan loves 'Super Bear' books so the Bananas help him try to get some.

The Submarine
The Bananas are excited because Rat has promised them their very own submarine!

Sage and Ginger's Baby Book
Mr Salt and Mrs Pepper are trying to take a photo of Sage and Ginger for their baby book, but they just can't seem to make the twins smile.

Pups Save a Jungle Miner/ Pups Save Uncle Otis from His Cabin
Uncle Otis races into a legendary lost gold mine, unaware of the traps inside. Skipping the instructions, Mr. Wingnut installs a smart home system in Otis's cabin, trapping them both inside.

Pups Save a Rocket Roller Skater/ Pups Save Ryders Surprise
After Ms. Marjorie accidentally receives rocket roller skates, she shows off her skills, making Daring Danny X jealous. Naughty monkeys use a present meant for Ryder to build a cage and trap Carlos.

Flying Banana Bandits!/ Penny's Chillin' Playdate
The Banana Bandits cause havoc when they decide they want Rhonda's banana nut muffins. When Anyu's brother slips and is left hanging on the edge of a cliff, it's all Cadets to the rescue.

Club SpongeBob / My Pretty Seahorse
SpongeBob and Patrick build a tiny clubhouse, but it's way too small for Squidward. / It's spring in Bikini Bottom, and SpongeBob adopts a wild seahorse named Mystery.

Bitter Work
As Aang struggles to master earthbending, Zuko wrestles with the fury blocking his path to lightning. Lessons from Toph and Iroh reveal that true strength lies in stillness, not rage.

Cooked!
The kids promise to help Dad with the grand opening of his new restaurant. But their lack of teamwork and crazy promos lead to an ultimate nightmare in the kitchen for Dad.

Annihilation Earth!: Part 2
As Earth teeters on the brink of annihilation, Mikey is captured by the Triceratons while the gang must fight to stop the Black Hole Generator before it's too late.

Superhero Chuckie / The Dog Broomer
Inspired by an old superhero show, Chuckie becomes a crime-fighter, and he's already got his first mission! / The Rugrats try to protect Spike from the \"dog broomer\".

Send in the Catdog / Fetch / Fishing for Trouble
CatDog join clown school, Dog shines but Cat struggles to keep up. / Cat wins a radio prize, but Dog's antics make claiming it tricky. / Cat has his eye on Dog's pet fish, and it looks delicious.

Starry Night Sleepover / Wild Carpet Chase
Zeta steals Shimmer, Shine, and Leah's wishing star, now they must get it back before Zeta makes a wish. / Zac wishes up a cool new carpet but Zeta manages to get her hands on it!

Episode 15
Come along with Lachy and Simon for some rhyming fun, then 'Do the Propeller' with The Wiggles as we explore planes and sing along.

Episode 16
Join The Wiggles as they explore the excitement of preschool life, from morning routines to playtime, and learn all about hygiene for clean preschool fun!

Tree
Penny draws a nice, simple tree. Yet, with Mark and Carol's kids out of action, maybe a little shading will help.

Papa Tom Davis
Tom Davis went from NASA scientist to Prime Minister of the Cook Islands. He studied the effects of cold on astronauts before leading his nation with the same adventurous spirit.

Esther James
Esther James was New Zealand's first fashion model and a tireless promoter of local products. During the Great Depression, she walked the length of the country to support Kiwi goods.

The Bully / Just One Bite
When SpongeBob learns that Squidward has never had a Krabby Patty, he obsesses over getting Squidward to try one. / SpongeBob panics when new student at Boating School threatens to beat him up.

Explorers: After school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. S3 E15.
Floating Farms, Bangladesh: Glitch's trip to a funky floating farm becomes a rescue mission on a fast-flowing river. S3 E42.
Dog Loves Spelling: Dog and Pug visit a forest where the witches are planning a great 'spelling' contest. Their friend Witch Willow needs their help. S1 E19.
Kicking the Ball: Upsy Daisy is the best at kicking the ball. She shows it to Iggle Piggle and Makka Pakka. S4 E2.
Okra: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the spectacular music duo, Okra, playing the floor piano together in perfect sync. S2 E8.

Andy and the Baby Kangaroos: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to Australia on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of why a group of kangaroos, and their joeys, are living on a beach. S1 E10.
Phones: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but things have changed a little. S3 E16.
Pavlova: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe. S3 E17.
Rain: When rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the yard. S3 E18.
Pizza Girls: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups. S3 E19.
Driving: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk S3 E20.
Relax: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach. S3 E40.

Octopus: When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand or enjoy, until they both realize they can play it their own way. S2 E40.
Beetles: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about beetles. S2 E16.
Squirrel: Dee encourages a friend to say 'squirrel', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. S6 E17.
Machu Picchu, Peru: A giant grimbot bounces down the valley of Machu Picchu. Can the Go Jetters stop him? S2 E6.
Hunt the Truck: Bill and Ben come up with a new game where they hide trucks and make the other engines look for them. S22 E22.
The Chinchilla: There's something sleeping in Andy's hat - a chinchilla! These sleepy animals aren't alone - Andy discovers there are lots of creatures that need a good long snooze. S2 E20.
Good Night Song: Close your eyes and drift away with the Good Night Song. S1 E12.
The Paper Boat Badge: Duggee shows the squirrels how to make a paper boat out of newspaper. S1 E16.
The Castle Badge: The squirrels hear an echoey voice coming from the top of a castle's spooky tower. S1 E17.
The Show And Tell Badge: The Squirrels look for something interesting to share at the clubhouse. S1 E18.
The Rocking Horse Badge: Duggee introduces the squirrels to Bucky his old rocking horse. Saddle up, squirrels! S1 E19.
The Get Well Soon Badge: Oh dear, poor Norrie is sick. Can the squirrels think of something to cheer her up? S1 E20.
Sea Horse: Cook and Line try to persuade Captain HeyHo to let their friend Dobbin the Sea Horse join the crew. But what will the captain decide - 'yay' or 'neigh'? S6 E20.
Rain: When rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the yard. S3 E18.

Robotato Returns: Evil Pea commands Carrot's new and improved Robotato to protect her. But when he malfunctions and carries her to the top of Tato Tower, it's up to the real Supertato to save her. S2 E21.
Banjo and the Bushfire: Thomas offers a lift to a ranger while working in the Australian Rainforest. Thomas is excited to learn from her about all the animals that live there. S22 E25.
Shop: Stanley covers Jose at the shop and ends up making too much popcorn. So as not to waste it all, Stanley and his friends put on a film night to screen Little Woo's film. S1 E12.
Duggee On The Dance Floor: Groove along with Duggee on the dance floor. S1 E22.
The Glasses Badge: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true? S2 E52.
Outside Outside: The Shallots want to explore beyond the front garden, so Sarah comes up with a plan. S2 E1.
Rubber: Kit and Pup have found a rubber ball and discover that the harder they throw it, the more it bounces. S1 E44.
Woodlice: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about woodlice. S2 E1.
Stinging Nettles: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about stinging nettles. S2 E2.
Lavender: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how lavender plays an important role in the environment. They find out that lavender attracts pollinators like bees and butterflies. S2 E3.

Dog Loves Undersea Adventures: Dog and Pug join Granny Pug in search of the Lesser-Spotted Kraken. Although they have a wonderful submarine, the Kraken is very clever and can camouflage itself. S1 E11.
Asparagus: Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side. S1 E49.
Hiding In The Flowerpots: The Pontipines set off for a walk around the garden. Mr and Mrs Pontipine lose the children. Which flowerpot are they hiding in? S1 E13.
Reese's Filipino Cassava Cake: Cassava cake is a very popular dessert in the Philippines, and Reese is making one for her friends to try when they come to visit. S1 E13.
Postosuchus and Teeth: Andy Day travels back 220 million years to the era of the postosuchus - a giant creature that roamed North America in the time of the earliest dinosaurs. S1 E18.
Carrot Powers Up: Carrot wants to become superstrong, so she restores Evil Pea's robot suit for herself. S1 E46.
Evil Pea's Veggie Vision: Evil Pea is tricked by lots of Supertatoes who appear all over the supermarket. S1 E47.
Come Back Cobs: The Cobs have finally had enough of Evil Pea's ungratefulness and team up with Supertato S1 E48.
Big Net Rescue: Carrot is determined to save Supertato from Evil Pea's trap without help from Prickly Pear S1 E49.
Moustache Mystery: Broccoli is horrified when someone paints moustaches on photographs of her friends! S1 E50.
Sheep Dog: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum. S3 E12.
Housework: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly. S3 E13.
Pass the Parcel: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer! S3 E14.

Leek: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Leek, who won't let anything, not even the chilly conditions backstage, stop him from singing his song \"Can't Hold Me Down\". S2 E9.

Andy and the Baby Dusky Leaf Monkey: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Malaysia, South East Asia on a baby animal mission to find out why new born dusky leaf monkeys look so different to their parents. S1 E11.
Band: Fifi, Little Woo and Fred call up Stanley to ask him to film their new song. They go around the town trying to find the perfect place. S1 E52.
Games: This episode is all about games and activities. All your numtum friends will be counting up to ten and having lots of fun and games along the way. S1 E25.

Mission: Train Station: Kika is a golden Labrador and guide dog for her owner Dr Amit, who is blind. She is trained to use her supersight to help him do as many things as he can by himself. Together, they make the best team! S1 E1.

The Board Game Badge: It is a rainy day in the clubhouse which means it's a perfect day for a board game. Duggee introduces the Squirrels to one of his favourite games, but it might be just a little bit too complex. S3 E44.
Decorating Donkey: It's nearly time for Tortoise to wake up from hibernation so Sarah plans a pretty surprise. S2 E20.
Stickbird: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick. S3 E41.
Bin Night: Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice. S2 E41.
Scots Pine: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover the importance of the Scots Pine tree. S2 E17.
Chair: Dee encourages a friend to say 'chair', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. S6 E18.
Avenue of the Baobabs, Madagascar: GrimHQ crashes into the Baobab trees. Can the Go Jetters rescue a baby lemur in time? S2 E7.
Cyclone Thomas: Thomas wants to be just like Isla, an Australian Flying Doctor's plane, who transports Dr Claire to remote places. S22 E23.
Magic Wardrobe: Andy explores a noisy rainforest in his magical wardrobe. S1 E1.
Row Your Boat: Sing along to Row Row Row Your Boat with John and Nigel. S1 E13.
Cool, Man: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel. S1 E1.
Sleepytime: Inside Bingo's dream, Bingo and Floppy have an intergalactic adventure, while the rest of her sleep-deprived family try to navigate Bingo's non-stop night-time bedhopping. S2 E26.
Andy and the Elephant Shrew: Mr Hammond has asked Andy to give a talk about elephant shrews. Andy heads to the African Savannah to find the tiny creature. S1 E11.
Under the Sea: Andy goes on an adventure to find the biggest fish in the ocean. Join him as he meets an octopus, white tipped shark and a huge whale shark and learns how to move like them. S1 E1.
Bullseye: Libby is in her bedroom playing a game called bullseye. She decides to use beanbags as darts and begins drawing targets to throw the beanbags in. S1 E18.
T-Rex: Andy finds a tooth that belongs to a T-Rex dinosaur. S1 E16.
Mission: Fun Run: Rayane's football team are doing a fun run at the park. But when his friend Karim takes a wrong turn, he and his hearing dog Diesel set off in hot pursuit. S2 E11.
Pizza Girls: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups. S3 E19.

Fruit and Veggie Friends Day: Everyone in the supermarket is enjoying Fruit and Veggie Friends Day, where they get to celebrate friendship, but Evil Pea wants to ruin it - and Supertato keeps stopping her. S2 E22.
Counting on Nia: Sir Topham Hatt asks Nia to take Annie and Clarabel and pick up passengers from Knapford Station, but she has trouble finding the right platform. S22 E26.
Farm: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley asks Little Woo, Fred and Fifi to join him in sowing seeds, watering plants and picking apples, all whilst having fun. S1 E13.
The Birthday Song: Dance along with Hennie and celebrate Duggee's Birthday! S1 E23.
The Tooth Brushing Badge: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath and teach him a special song to help him learn how to brush his teeth. S3 E1.
Umbrella Bubbles: After getting muddy, Umbrella has to brave his fear of getting wet and take his first bath! S2 E2.
Chalk: Kit and Pup are drawing colourful pictures with sticks of chalk, but they are puzzled to see their pictures rub away when they brush against them. S1 E45.
Table Mountain, South Africa: Glitch wants to ski, so the Grimbots give Table Mountain a snowy peak, which threatens its rare plants. S1 E17.
Safety Machines: Grace looks at three amazing safety machines: a road cone layer, a road marking removal truck and a road lane changer. S4 E11.
Cove Booty: Captain Captain orders Sandy and Seaweed to clear out the clutter in the cove, so Sandy and Seaweed hold a pirate jumble sale. S7 E17.
N: Dee encourages a friend to say 'n', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We see a nest, some noses and a net, and watch some newts eat noodles at night! S7 E14.
Dog Loves Drawing: Pug is trying to learn how to draw. Our heroes go on an adventure with a magic pencil. While he is shows them what he can do, he rubs them out. S1 E12.

Shaun: Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble. S1 E50.
The Pinky Ponk Adventure: The Pinky Ponk gets stuck in a tree and tips up. Everybody slides up and down and the Pinky Ponk breaks free. S1 E14.
Valentina's Greek Vegetarian Moussaka: Valentina shows us how to make a tasty Greek meal. Her moussaka recipe is loaded with fresh vegetables and topped with green lentils. S1 E14.
T-Rex and Roar: Andy travels back 65 million years to the time of the Tyrannosaurus Rex to record the sound of its roar, but it means getting up close to the predator. S1 E19.
The Hiccup Badge: The Squirrels meet a little worm. It's swallowed a bit too much earth and has the hiccups. S1 E21.
Tortoise Snooze: When it is time for Tortoise to hibernate, Sarah and Duck help him find a quiet place to sleep. S2 E6.

programmes.t: My Pet And Me: Teeny Tiny Creatures
programmes.d: Bumblebees: Presented by Rory and Nina, each episode focuses on one type of creature- we learn how to identify it, what it eats, what eats it and what role it plays in the wider environment. S2 E1.
Philip To The Rescue: James pulls a very long train and comes off the rails. S19 E26.
Tina: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina. S3 E21.
Waltzing Potato: Evil Pea plans to freeze Supertato into an ice cube by pretending to teach him to dance. S1 E51.
Beavers: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about beavers. S2 E6.
Go Jet Academy: Dream Team Trouble: Ubercorn and Glitch have to team up when they get stuck at the most remote place on Earth. S3 E43.

Dog Loves Diggers: Dog and Pug are on a building site and they meet three Diggers - Big Digger, Bigger Digger and Tiny. The two big diggers look down on Tiny but she is the one who wants to do all the work. S1 E20.

Where Are The Tombliboos' Toothbrushes?: The Tombliboos' toothbrushes just won't stay put and the Pontipine children cannot be found. Later, their problems are solved and they're ready for bedtime. S4 E3.
Leek: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Leek, who won't let anything, not even the chilly conditions backstage, stop him from singing his song \"Can't Hold Me Down\". S2 E9.

Andy and the Baby Dusky Leaf Monkey: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Malaysia, South East Asia on a baby animal mission to find out why new born dusky leaf monkeys look so different to their parents. S1 E11.
Band: Fifi, Little Woo and Fred call up Stanley to ask him to film their new song. They go around the town trying to find the perfect place. S1 E52.
Games: This episode is all about games and activities. All your numtum friends will be counting up to ten and having lots of fun and games along the way. S1 E25.

Mission: Train Station: Kika is a golden Labrador and guide dog for her owner Dr Amit, who is blind. She is trained to use her supersight to help him do as many things as he can by himself. Together, they make the best team! S1 E1.

The Board Game Badge: It is a rainy day in the clubhouse which means it's a perfect day for a board game. Duggee introduces the Squirrels to one of his favourite games, but it might be just a little bit too complex. S3 E44.
Decorating Donkey: It's nearly time for Tortoise to wake up from hibernation so Sarah plans a pretty surprise. S2 E20.
Stickbird: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick. S3 E41.
Bin Night: Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice. S2 E41.
Scots Pine: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover the importance of the Scots Pine tree. S2 E17.
Chair: Dee encourages a friend to say 'chair', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. S6 E18.
Avenue of the Baobabs, Madagascar: GrimHQ crashes into the Baobab trees. Can the Go Jetters rescue a baby lemur in time? S2 E7.
Cyclone Thomas: Thomas wants to be just like Isla, an Australian Flying Doctor's plane, who transports Dr Claire to remote places. S22 E23.
Magic Wardrobe: Andy explores a noisy rainforest in his magical wardrobe. S1 E1.
Row Your Boat: Sing along to Row Row Row Your Boat with John and Nigel. S1 E13.
Cool, Man: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel. S1 E1.
Sleepytime: Inside Bingo's dream, Bingo and Floppy have an intergalactic adventure, while the rest of her sleep-deprived family try to navigate Bingo's non-stop night-time bedhopping. S2 E26.
Andy and the Elephant Shrew: Mr Hammond has asked Andy to give a talk about elephant shrews. Andy heads to the African Savannah to find the tiny creature. S1 E11.
Under the Sea: Andy goes on an adventure to find the biggest fish in the ocean. Join him as he meets an octopus, white tipped shark and a huge whale shark and learns how to move like them. S1 E1.
Bullseye: Libby is in her bedroom playing a game called bullseye. She decides to use beanbags as darts and begins drawing targets to throw the beanbags in. S1 E18.
T-Rex: Andy finds a tooth that belongs to a T-Rex dinosaur. S1 E16.
Mission: Fun Run: Rayane's football team are doing a fun run at the park. But when his friend Karim takes a wrong turn, he and his hearing dog Diesel set off in hot pursuit. S2 E11.
Pizza Girls: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups. S3 E19.

Fruit and Veggie Friends Day: Everyone in the supermarket is enjoying Fruit and Veggie Friends Day, where they get to celebrate friendship, but Evil Pea wants to ruin it - and Supertato keeps stopping her. S2 E22.
Counting on Nia: Sir Topham Hatt asks Nia to take Annie and Clarabel and pick up passengers from Knapford Station, but she has trouble finding the right platform. S22 E26.
Farm: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley asks Little Woo, Fred and Fifi to join him in sowing seeds, watering plants and picking apples, all whilst having fun. S1 E13.
The Birthday Song: Dance along with Hennie and celebrate Duggee's Birthday! S1 E23.
The Tooth Brushing Badge: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath and teach him a special song to help him learn how to brush his teeth. S3 E1.
Umbrella Bubbles: After getting muddy, Umbrella has to brave his fear of getting wet and take his first bath! S2 E2.
Chalk: Kit and Pup are drawing colourful pictures with sticks of chalk, but they are puzzled to see their pictures rub away when they brush against them. S1 E45.
Table Mountain, South Africa: Glitch wants to ski, so the Grimbots give Table Mountain a snowy peak, which threatens its rare plants. S1 E17.
Safety Machines: Grace looks at three amazing safety machines: a road cone layer, a road marking removal truck and a road lane changer. S4 E11.
Cove Booty: Captain Captain orders Sandy and Seaweed to clear out the clutter in the cove, so Sandy and Seaweed hold a pirate jumble sale. S7 E17.
N: Dee encourages a friend to say 'n', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We see a nest, some noses and a net, and watch some newts eat noodles at night! S7 E14.
Dog Loves Drawing: Pug is trying to learn how to draw. Our heroes go on an adventure with a magic pencil. While he is shows them what he can do, he rubs them out. S1 E12.

Shaun: Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble. S1 E50.
The Pinky Ponk Adventure: The Pinky Ponk gets stuck in a tree and tips up. Everybody slides up and down and the Pinky Ponk breaks free. S1 E14.
Valentina's Greek Vegetarian Moussaka: Valentina shows us how to make a tasty Greek meal. Her moussaka recipe is loaded with fresh vegetables and topped with green lentils. S1 E14.
T-Rex and Roar: Andy travels back 65 million years to the time of the Tyrannosaurus Rex to record the sound of its roar, but it means getting up close to the predator. S1 E19.
The Hiccup Badge: The Squirrels meet a little worm. It's swallowed a bit too much earth and has the hiccups. S1 E21.
Tortoise Snooze: When it is time for Tortoise to hibernate, Sarah and Duck help him find a quiet place to sleep. S2 E6.

programmes.d: Bumblebees: Presented by Rory and Nina, each episode focuses on one type of creature- we learn how to identify it, what it eats, what eats it and what role it plays in the wider environment. S2 E1.
Philip To The Rescue: James pulls a very long train and comes off the rails. S19 E26.
Tina: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina. S3 E21.
Waltzing Potato: Evil Pea plans to freeze Supertato into an ice cube by pretending to teach him to dance. S1 E51.
Beavers: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about beavers. S2 E6.
Go Jet Academy: Dream Team Trouble: Ubercorn and Glitch have to team up when they get stuck at the most remote place on Earth. S3 E43.

Dog Loves Diggers: Dog and Pug are on a building site and they meet three Diggers - Big Digger, Bigger Digger and Tiny. The two big diggers look down on Tiny but she is the one who wants to do all the work. S1 E20.

Where Are The Tombliboos' Toothbrushes?: The Tombliboos' toothbrushes just won't stay put and the Pontipine children cannot be found. Later, their problems are solved and they're ready for bedtime. S4 E3.
Grapefruit: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Grapefruit, dedicating the song \"All My Friends\" to the close pals who go with her everywhere. S2 E10.

Andy and the Prairie Dog Pups: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Chihuahua, Northern Mexico to discover how a colony of black tailed prairie dogs protect their pups from prowling bull snakes, hawks and coyotes. S1 E12.
Museum: Stanley and the children tour the museum and quickly realise there's nothing about them or their friends, so they make a new exhibit all about their town today! S1 E1.
Snug as a Bug: Freddie has a bug hotel, and he wants to make beds for the bugs with sticks and leaves. Unfortunately, all the sticks he can find in the garden are the wrong size! S1 E1.

Mission: Muddy Puddle: Meagaidh the Border Collie is a search and rescue dog who works with her owner Tom. Her supernose follows scents and smells like clues, so they can rescue people who need their help. S1 E2.

The Direction Badge: The Squirrels go out for a walk but can't find a way back to the clubhouse. Through a series of unusual methods, the Squirrels learn all about direction and how to find their way to the clubhouse. S3 E45.
Duck Hotel: Duck wins a trip for two to a rather exciting hotel and finds that he settles in much quicker than Sarah... S2 E21.
Show And Tell: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around. S3 E42.
Muffin Cone: When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play `sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo. S2 E42.

Shells: Ranger and the Ramblers discover how shells play an important role in the environment. They find how shells help protect the creatures that live inside and that many animals grow their own shells. S2 E18.
Alien: Dee encourages a friend to say 'alien', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. S6 E19.
Venice, Italy: The Go Jetters get a sinking feeling when Glitch turns the canals of Venice into roads. S2 E8.
The Case of the Puzzling Parts: Sidney is shunting a flatbed of engine parts but he cannot remember what he is supposed to be doing with them. S22 E24.
Chameleon: Andy and the clever colour changers! S1 E2.
Hey Diddle Diddle: Sing along to Hey Diddle Diddle, with the dancing bugs! S1 E14.
Hey Quacky!: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors. S1 E2.
Seesaw: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help flip him off, but they still need to find one more friend. S2 E27.
Andy and the Bowerbird: Disaster strikes at Safari World when Andy accidentally breaks a Bowerbird nest that Mr Hammond was going to put on display. S1 E12.
African Savannah: Andy heads to Africa and meets some incredible creatures along the way. He pronks with springbok, prowls with lions and swings his trunk with a herd of elephants. S1 E2.

Dominoes: Today in Newton Avenue, Jayden and Papa are playing a game of dominoes. Later, when Papa and Jayden help Nana with the washing, Jayden tries to sort out a variety of socks from the laundry basket. S1 E19.
The Reindeer: In this episode, we meet Robbie the Reindeer. He tells us about animals in coldest places on earth. S2 E1.

Mission: Bumpy Bits: Kika and Dr Amit are off to the florists following a secret trail of \"bumpy bits\"; the system of clever dots and lines on the pavement that humans call \"tactile paving\". S2 E12.
Driving: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk S3 E20.
Kite Plight: Evil Pea uses her balloon to cut down everyone's kites so she can rule the supermarket skies. Supertato and Carrot must use chopsticks to stop her. S2 E23.
Emily Saves The World: Emily thinks the other engines pull much more exciting loads then she does. So when she is given a huge globe to transport she decides to show it off. S19 E1.
Dig: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together. S1 E14.
The Badges Song: Come along and get yourself a Duggee Badge with Billy and the Dancing Bugs. S1 E24.
The Duck Badge: The clubhouse is inundated with stray ducklings who think Norrie is their mum, so Duggee and the Squirrels need to do some detective work to reunite them with their real mum. S3 E2.
Cloud Tower: A search for shade on a hot day leads Sarah and Duck to discover a fascinating tower in the park. S2 E3.
Bubbles: Kit and Pup are blowing bubbles, but whilst Pup is able to blow lots of bubbles, Kit's impatience means she gets frustrated when she can't. S1 E46.
The Northern Lights, Finland: Ubercorn is excited to see the Northern Lights, but Glitch's Grunge-Grimbler covers them with smoke. S1 E18.
Water Safety Machines: In this episode she looks at three amazing water safety machines: a pollution collection boat, a search & rescue helicopter and a helicopter training machine. S4 E12.
Bring Your Pet to Work: It's \"Bring Your Pet to Work Day\" but Captain Captain doesn't have a pet. Luckily, or unluckily, the bumbling pirate pair have a plan. S7 E18.
O: Dee encourages a friend to say 'o', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We meet an octopus and an orangutan, and see an ostrich in an office! S7 E15.
Dog Loves Biscuits: Dog and Pug meet the biscuit factory owner, who shows them round his factory. One of his workers turns out to be a cat who makes fishy dog biscuits. S1 E13.

Daddy Putdown: When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls' evening routine. But with Bluey missing Mum, Dad has to pull out all the games he knows to keep them entertained. S1 E51.
Tombliboos' Tower of Five: The Pontipines are counting to five. Makka Pakka is building a pile of five stones. The Tombliboos are inside their bush, building with their very own bricks. S1 E15.
Malika's Moroccan Fish Ball Tagine: Malika shows us how to make a Moroccan fish ball tagine. She uses fresh fish poached in spices and cooks it in a traditional Moroccan tagine. S1 E15.
Allosaurus and Salt: Andy Day travels back in time after promising to get some more salt for Hatty so she can finish her display of a fossilised footprint of an allosaurus. S1 E20.
The Maze Badge: The Squirrels build a maze out of all the things in Duggee's workshop. S1 E22.
Fast Slow Bungalow: Flamingo and John give Sarah and Duck a tour of their house and invite them to play their favourite game... S2 E7.

programmes.t: My Pet And Me: Teeny Tiny Creatures
programmes.d: Millipedes: Cristiano finds out all about some teeny tiny recyclers - millipedes! Chantelle visits Chester Zoo to meet Amber and some Tanzanian Red-Legged Millipedes, while Rory and son Sandy search under rocks. S2 E2.
Thomas The Babysitter: Thomas, Annie and Clarabel have to deal with a noisy baby. S19 E27.
Whale Watching: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching. S3 E22.

Broccoli's Movie Night: It's movie night, and Broccoli is showing her movie called Supertato: The Movie. But Evil Pea keeps changing the story to make herself look like the hero instead of Supertato. S1 E52.
Orchards: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out about orchards. S2 E7.
Cave Train Trouble, Slovenia: Lars zooms to the rescue when Glitch and Tala go off the rails in search of a baby dragon. S3 E44.
Dog Loves Pirates: Pug is making a hat and our two friends go on an adventure on a pirate ship. They find out that the captain is chosen by whoever wears the captain's hat. S1 E21.

The Pontipines' Picnic: Pontipines are looking for the perfect place to have a picnic. They invite the Wottingers over. They took a very long time to arrive. They go to the picnic by the Ninky Nonk. S4 E4.

Driving: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk S3 E20.
Kite Plight: Evil Pea uses her balloon to cut down everyone's kites so she can rule the supermarket skies. Supertato and Carrot must use chopsticks to stop her. S2 E23.
Emily Saves The World: Emily thinks the other engines pull much more exciting loads then she does. So when she is given a huge globe to transport she decides to show it off. S19 E1.
Dig: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together. S1 E14.
The Badges Song: Come along and get yourself a Duggee Badge with Billy and the Dancing Bugs. S1 E24.
The Duck Badge: The clubhouse is inundated with stray ducklings who think Norrie is their mum, so Duggee and the Squirrels need to do some detective work to reunite them with their real mum. S3 E2.
Cloud Tower: A search for shade on a hot day leads Sarah and Duck to discover a fascinating tower in the park. S2 E3.
Bubbles: Kit and Pup are blowing bubbles, but whilst Pup is able to blow lots of bubbles, Kit's impatience means she gets frustrated when she can't. S1 E46.
The Northern Lights, Finland: Ubercorn is excited to see the Northern Lights, but Glitch's Grunge-Grimbler covers them with smoke. S1 E18.
Water Safety Machines: In this episode she looks at three amazing water safety machines: a pollution collection boat, a search & rescue helicopter and a helicopter training machine. S4 E12.
Bring Your Pet to Work: It's \"Bring Your Pet to Work Day\" but Captain Captain doesn't have a pet. Luckily, or unluckily, the bumbling pirate pair have a plan. S7 E18.
O: Dee encourages a friend to say 'o', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We meet an octopus and an orangutan, and see an ostrich in an office! S7 E15.
Dog Loves Biscuits: Dog and Pug meet the biscuit factory owner, who shows them round his factory. One of his workers turns out to be a cat who makes fishy dog biscuits. S1 E13.

Daddy Putdown: When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls' evening routine. But with Bluey missing Mum, Dad has to pull out all the games he knows to keep them entertained. S1 E51.
Tombliboos' Tower of Five: The Pontipines are counting to five. Makka Pakka is building a pile of five stones. The Tombliboos are inside their bush, building with their very own bricks. S1 E15.
Malika's Moroccan Fish Ball Tagine: Malika shows us how to make a Moroccan fish ball tagine. She uses fresh fish poached in spices and cooks it in a traditional Moroccan tagine. S1 E15.
Allosaurus and Salt: Andy Day travels back in time after promising to get some more salt for Hatty so she can finish her display of a fossilised footprint of an allosaurus. S1 E20.
The Maze Badge: The Squirrels build a maze out of all the things in Duggee's workshop. S1 E22.
Fast Slow Bungalow: Flamingo and John give Sarah and Duck a tour of their house and invite them to play their favourite game... S2 E7.

programmes.t: My Pet And Me: Teeny Tiny Creatures
programmes.d: Millipedes: Cristiano finds out all about some teeny tiny recyclers - millipedes! Chantelle visits Chester Zoo to meet Amber and some Tanzanian Red-Legged Millipedes, while Rory and son Sandy search under rocks. S2 E2.
Thomas The Babysitter: Thomas, Annie and Clarabel have to deal with a noisy baby. S19 E27.
Whale Watching: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching. S3 E22.

Broccoli's Movie Night: It's movie night, and Broccoli is showing her movie called Supertato: The Movie. But Evil Pea keeps changing the story to make herself look like the hero instead of Supertato. S1 E52.
Orchards: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out about orchards. S2 E7.
Cave Train Trouble, Slovenia: Lars zooms to the rescue when Glitch and Tala go off the rails in search of a baby dragon. S3 E44.
Dog Loves Pirates: Pug is making a hat and our two friends go on an adventure on a pirate ship. They find out that the captain is chosen by whoever wears the captain's hat. S1 E21.

The Pontipines' Picnic: Pontipines are looking for the perfect place to have a picnic. They invite the Wottingers over. They took a very long time to arrive. They go to the picnic by the Ninky Nonk. S4 E4.
Grapefruit: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Grapefruit, dedicating the song \"All My Friends\" to the close pals who go with her everywhere. S2 E10.

Andy and the Prairie Dog Pups: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Chihuahua, Northern Mexico to discover how a colony of black tailed prairie dogs protect their pups from prowling bull snakes, hawks and coyotes. S1 E12.
Museum: Stanley and the children tour the museum and quickly realise there's nothing about them or their friends, so they make a new exhibit all about their town today! S1 E1.
Snug as a Bug: Freddie has a bug hotel, and he wants to make beds for the bugs with sticks and leaves. Unfortunately, all the sticks he can find in the garden are the wrong size! S1 E1.

Mission: Muddy Puddle: Meagaidh the Border Collie is a search and rescue dog who works with her owner Tom. Her supernose follows scents and smells like clues, so they can rescue people who need their help. S1 E2.

The Direction Badge: The Squirrels go out for a walk but can't find a way back to the clubhouse. Through a series of unusual methods, the Squirrels learn all about direction and how to find their way to the clubhouse. S3 E45.
Duck Hotel: Duck wins a trip for two to a rather exciting hotel and finds that he settles in much quicker than Sarah... S2 E21.
Show And Tell: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around. S3 E42.
Muffin Cone: When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play `sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo. S2 E42.

Shells: Ranger and the Ramblers discover how shells play an important role in the environment. They find how shells help protect the creatures that live inside and that many animals grow their own shells. S2 E18.
Alien: Dee encourages a friend to say 'alien', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. S6 E19.
Venice, Italy: The Go Jetters get a sinking feeling when Glitch turns the canals of Venice into roads. S2 E8.
The Case of the Puzzling Parts: Sidney is shunting a flatbed of engine parts but he cannot remember what he is supposed to be doing with them. S22 E24.
Chameleon: Andy and the clever colour changers! S1 E2.
Hey Diddle Diddle: Sing along to Hey Diddle Diddle, with the dancing bugs! S1 E14.
Hey Quacky!: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors. S1 E2.
Seesaw: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help flip him off, but they still need to find one more friend. S2 E27.
Andy and the Bowerbird: Disaster strikes at Safari World when Andy accidentally breaks a Bowerbird nest that Mr Hammond was going to put on display. S1 E12.
African Savannah: Andy heads to Africa and meets some incredible creatures along the way. He pronks with springbok, prowls with lions and swings his trunk with a herd of elephants. S1 E2.

Dominoes: Today in Newton Avenue, Jayden and Papa are playing a game of dominoes. Later, when Papa and Jayden help Nana with the washing, Jayden tries to sort out a variety of socks from the laundry basket. S1 E19.
The Reindeer: In this episode, we meet Robbie the Reindeer. He tells us about animals in coldest places on earth. S2 E1.

Mission: Bumpy Bits: Kika and Dr Amit are off to the florists following a secret trail of \"bumpy bits\"; the system of clever dots and lines on the pavement that humans call \"tactile paving\". S2 E12.

The Pontipines' Picnic: Pontipines are looking for the perfect place to have a picnic. They invite the Wottingers over. They took a very long time to arrive. They go to the picnic by the Ninky Nonk. S4 E4.
Chilli Peppers: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers, melting Kiwi backstage and performing their song \"We're Chilli When It's Hot!\" S2 E11.

Andy and the Baby European Pond Turtle: In this episode, Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the Danube river in Vienna, Austria on a baby animal mission to help a newly hatched European pond turtle reach water. S1 E13.
House: Myrtle's aunt Cressy is coming to stay, and she needs Stanley to make her a bed for her. This escalates into Stanley building her a whole set of rooms outside Myrtles actual house. S1 E2.
Racing Cars: Rio plays with her toy cars in the living room while Dad hangs up his football shirts to dry. She tries to keep track of them, but they all look so similar! S1 E2.

Mission: Wake Up!: Diesel is a hearing dog for his owner Ryan who's deaf. He helps Ryan get up in time so he won't be late for his football match. Ryan wakes Ryan up when the alarm goes, and gets Ryan to come downstairs S1 E3.
The Perfume Badge: The Squirrels make their very own perfumes with accompanying advertisements to show how their perfumes are uniquely theirs. S3 E46.
Parasol Show: Umbrella is nervous about meeting up with his pen pal at the Parasol Show, so Sarah and Duck accompany him. S2 E22.
Dragon: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help. S3 E43.
Duck Cake: Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake. S2 E43.

Wild Flower Meadow: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how wild flower meadows play an important role. They find out that both big and small patches of wild flowers can be great wildlife corridors for creatures. S2 E19.
Skin: Dee encourages a friend to say 'skin', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. S6 E20.
Seattle Space Needle, USA: The team goes where no Go Jetter has gone before, when Glitch tries to launch into space. S2 E9.
Banjo and the Bushfire: Thomas offers a lift to a ranger while working in the Australian Rainforest. Thomas is excited to learn from her about all the animals that live there. S22 E25.
Sleeping Lion: Learn some amazing secret languages with Andy! S1 E3.
Five Speckled Frogs: Count the 5 speckled frogs and sing along with Mrs Weaver and the Squirrels. S1 E15.
Frog Song: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse. S1 E3.
Movies: It is Bluey's first trip to the cinema, but she's worried that the movie will be too scary. When Bingo starts running amok in the theatre, she must conquer her fear and help Dad out. S2 E28.
Andy and the Hermit Crab: Andy works at Safari world, the biggest and best safari park on the planet, home to animals from all over the globe. S1 E13.
Rainforests: Andy treks into deep rainforest in search of an orangutan. Along the way he swings through the trees with some spider monkeys and dances with manakin birds. S1 E3.

Troublesome Trifle: Dad is in the kitchen cooking dinner. Rio asks if she can help make dessert, which is trifle. But Rio gets confused, as some of the stew ingredients are mixed in with the trifle ingredients. S1 E20.
The Cute Puppy: Andy has some puppies in the hideout that are just adorable. It makes him wonder - why do we find some animals so cute? S2 E2.
Mission: Birdwatcher: Jamie and his search and rescue dog Dan set off into the woods to find a birdwatcher who has gone missing while trying to spot a rare bird - the Woofton woodpecker. S2 E13.
Tina: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina. S3 E21.
Crafty Pea: Evil Pea makes a monster costume in the craft aisle to scare the Tato Team out of the supermarket, but Supertato wants to be the monster's friend. S2 E24.

Timothy & The Rainbow Car: Of all the engines on Sodor, Bill and Ben love playing tricks on Timothy the most. One day, they tell him that they need him to find a lost truck for them that is all the colours of the rainbow. S19 E2.
Holiday: Seamus has booked the wrong date for his and Little Woo's holiday. Stanley repurposes the locations of the town into activities and sights to give them a holiday in a day. S1 E15.
The Earth Song: Can you feel the love for the earth tonight, sing along with the amazing Mrs Weaver! S1 E25.
The Day Off Badge: It's Duggee's Day Off but it's not long before the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures on their own days off... earning their Day Off badges in the process! S3 E3.
Sound Jumble: When Sarah hears some interesting music on the radio, she and Duck try to recreate it. S2 E4.
Fruit: Pup has been shopping for fruit, but whenever he puts the fruit in a bowl it keeps disappearing. Who could be taking the fruit? S1 E47.
Amazon Rain Forest, South America: Glitch wants a picnic so he stops the rain in the rainforest, upsetting the local tree frogs. S1 E19.
Demolition Machines: Grace looks at demolition machines. With each machine that Grace drives, she first shows the outside features, inside controls and then drives it. S4 E13.
Pirate Stickers: Sandy and Seaweed have started collecting \"Famous Pirates and Crew of the World\" stickers only to discover there's one last rare sticker to find. S7 E19.
P: Dee encourages a friend to say 'p', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We eat some popcorn and pizza, and even have a pyjama party! S7 E16.
Dog Loves Magic: Pug wants to perfect his magic tricks, so Dog opens up an adventure to meet the great Hugh Deanie. But Pug's magic allows all the rabbits to escape! S1 E14.

Verandah Santa (Christmas Episode): It's Christmas and Bluey is very focused on being good to get more presents. But when a game of Verandah Santa leaves cousin Socks upset, Bluey must learn the virtue of kindness. S1 E52.
Igglepiggle's Mucky Patch: Igglepiggle falls down and gets a muddy patch on his tummy. He gets the mud on his hand, on his blanket and on Upsy Daisy. S1 E16.
Marina's Mexican Enchiladas: Marina takes us to Mexico, cooking a traditional dish called enchiladas. She also entertains her friends with a traditional mariachi band. S2 E1.
Andy and the Chipmunk: When Mr Hammond accidentally breaks some acorns back at Safari World, it's up to Andy to jet off in his safari-mobile to Canada and collect some more. S1 E1.
The Raindance Badge: It's a hot day and Duggee's flowers are looking sad. Some water would perk them up. S1 E23.
Bags of Bags: Scarf Lady has misplaced Bag in the Big Shop, so Sarah and Duck help with the search. S2 E8.

programmes.t: My Pet And Me: Teeny Tiny Creatures
programmes.d: Seahorses: Rory and Sandy are at an aquarium while Chantelle goes underwater - they're looking for seahorses. S2 E3.
Rocky Rescue: When Rocky derails, the Sodor Search and Rescue Team have to work together to rescue him. S19 E28.
Family Meeting: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge. S3 E23.
Tato Tower Takeover: Evil Pea and the Mini Peas take over the Tato Tower HQ and lock Supertato out. S1 E1.
Earthworms: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about earthworms. S2 E8.
Endangered Species, São Paulo, Brazil: The rare Black Lion Tamarins need help to survive in the pristine forests of Sao Paulo. S3 E45.
Dog Loves Portrait: Pug is trying to improve his portrait painting. Our friends arrive in a palace where the King can only think about his own portraits. S1 E22.
Upsy Daisy's Funny Bed: After waking Upsy Daisy, IgglePiggle goes with her for a walk in the garden. What a smart idea, Upsy Daisy. S4 E5.

Dragon: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help. S3 E43.
Duck Cake: Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake. S2 E43.

Wild Flower Meadow: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how wild flower meadows play an important role. They find out that both big and small patches of wild flowers can be great wildlife corridors for creatures. S2 E19.
Skin: Dee encourages a friend to say 'skin', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. S6 E20.
Seattle Space Needle, USA: The team goes where no Go Jetter has gone before, when Glitch tries to launch into space. S2 E9.
Banjo and the Bushfire: Thomas offers a lift to a ranger while working in the Australian Rainforest. Thomas is excited to learn from her about all the animals that live there. S22 E25.
Sleeping Lion: Learn some amazing secret languages with Andy! S1 E3.
Five Speckled Frogs: Count the 5 speckled frogs and sing along with Mrs Weaver and the Squirrels. S1 E15.
Frog Song: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse. S1 E3.
Movies: It is Bluey's first trip to the cinema, but she's worried that the movie will be too scary. When Bingo starts running amok in the theatre, she must conquer her fear and help Dad out. S2 E28.
Andy and the Hermit Crab: Andy works at Safari world, the biggest and best safari park on the planet, home to animals from all over the globe. S1 E13.
Rainforests: Andy treks into deep rainforest in search of an orangutan. Along the way he swings through the trees with some spider monkeys and dances with manakin birds. S1 E3.

Troublesome Trifle: Dad is in the kitchen cooking dinner. Rio asks if she can help make dessert, which is trifle. But Rio gets confused, as some of the stew ingredients are mixed in with the trifle ingredients. S1 E20.
The Cute Puppy: Andy has some puppies in the hideout that are just adorable. It makes him wonder - why do we find some animals so cute? S2 E2.
Mission: Birdwatcher: Jamie and his search and rescue dog Dan set off into the woods to find a birdwatcher who has gone missing while trying to spot a rare bird - the Woofton woodpecker. S2 E13.
Tina: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina. S3 E21.
Crafty Pea: Evil Pea makes a monster costume in the craft aisle to scare the Tato Team out of the supermarket, but Supertato wants to be the monster's friend. S2 E24.

Timothy & The Rainbow Car: Of all the engines on Sodor, Bill and Ben love playing tricks on Timothy the most. One day, they tell him that they need him to find a lost truck for them that is all the colours of the rainbow. S19 E2.
Holiday: Seamus has booked the wrong date for his and Little Woo's holiday. Stanley repurposes the locations of the town into activities and sights to give them a holiday in a day. S1 E15.
The Earth Song: Can you feel the love for the earth tonight, sing along with the amazing Mrs Weaver! S1 E25.
The Day Off Badge: It's Duggee's Day Off but it's not long before the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures on their own days off... earning their Day Off badges in the process! S3 E3.
Sound Jumble: When Sarah hears some interesting music on the radio, she and Duck try to recreate it. S2 E4.
Fruit: Pup has been shopping for fruit, but whenever he puts the fruit in a bowl it keeps disappearing. Who could be taking the fruit? S1 E47.
Amazon Rain Forest, South America: Glitch wants a picnic so he stops the rain in the rainforest, upsetting the local tree frogs. S1 E19.
Demolition Machines: Grace looks at demolition machines. With each machine that Grace drives, she first shows the outside features, inside controls and then drives it. S4 E13.
Pirate Stickers: Sandy and Seaweed have started collecting \"Famous Pirates and Crew of the World\" stickers only to discover there's one last rare sticker to find. S7 E19.
P: Dee encourages a friend to say 'p', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We eat some popcorn and pizza, and even have a pyjama party! S7 E16.
Dog Loves Magic: Pug wants to perfect his magic tricks, so Dog opens up an adventure to meet the great Hugh Deanie. But Pug's magic allows all the rabbits to escape! S1 E14.

Verandah Santa (Christmas Episode): It's Christmas and Bluey is very focused on being good to get more presents. But when a game of Verandah Santa leaves cousin Socks upset, Bluey must learn the virtue of kindness. S1 E52.
Igglepiggle's Mucky Patch: Igglepiggle falls down and gets a muddy patch on his tummy. He gets the mud on his hand, on his blanket and on Upsy Daisy. S1 E16.
Marina's Mexican Enchiladas: Marina takes us to Mexico, cooking a traditional dish called enchiladas. She also entertains her friends with a traditional mariachi band. S2 E1.
Andy and the Chipmunk: When Mr Hammond accidentally breaks some acorns back at Safari World, it's up to Andy to jet off in his safari-mobile to Canada and collect some more. S1 E1.
The Raindance Badge: It's a hot day and Duggee's flowers are looking sad. Some water would perk them up. S1 E23.
Bags of Bags: Scarf Lady has misplaced Bag in the Big Shop, so Sarah and Duck help with the search. S2 E8.

programmes.t: My Pet And Me: Teeny Tiny Creatures
programmes.d: Seahorses: Rory and Sandy are at an aquarium while Chantelle goes underwater - they're looking for seahorses. S2 E3.
Rocky Rescue: When Rocky derails, the Sodor Search and Rescue Team have to work together to rescue him. S19 E28.
Family Meeting: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge. S3 E23.
Tato Tower Takeover: Evil Pea and the Mini Peas take over the Tato Tower HQ and lock Supertato out. S1 E1.
Earthworms: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about earthworms. S2 E8.
Endangered Species, São Paulo, Brazil: The rare Black Lion Tamarins need help to survive in the pristine forests of Sao Paulo. S3 E45.
Dog Loves Portrait: Pug is trying to improve his portrait painting. Our friends arrive in a palace where the King can only think about his own portraits. S1 E22.
Upsy Daisy's Funny Bed: After waking Upsy Daisy, IgglePiggle goes with her for a walk in the garden. What a smart idea, Upsy Daisy. S4 E5.
